properties.descriptionHtml:
This cottage will save you $650 because of its central location. It is within easy walking distance to the VITRAN Bus—no need to rent a vehicle!

This Caribbean cabana, also affectionately known as the Christmas Cottage, offers the intrepid traveler an unforgettable St. John experience. Nestled comfortably on the valley floor of Coral Bay village in a quiet residential neighborhood, the cabana presents rustic simplicity with irresistible Caribbean charm.

The Cabana has been a ‘honeymoon’ cottage to the owners for the last five years while they constructed the main house on the property. Cozy yet airy, the cabana makes available all the outdoor living experience of camping with the convenience of electricity, refrigeration and laundry facilities. Linens, bath towels, and beach towels are provided. Situated on the level ground makes for easy access and parking.

Local grocery store, mail service, restaurants, includes local landmarks, Skinny Legs, and Aqua Bistro. Enjoy plenty of nightly entertainment a simple 5-minute walk away. Yoga classes convene several times a week at the Agricultural Pavilion, a short walk from the house. Or if Pilates is your preference, classes are available at the same convenient location. Catch the VITRAN to world-class beaches for the day, or hike the many trails on the eastern end of St. John. Head to the bustling town of Cruz Bay via the VITRAN for a dollar. Bars and restaurants, quaint boutiques and island ferry opportunities are all conveniently located to the cabana. Enjoy World-Class Beaches, Hiking & Restaurants in Coral Bay, St. John.

Harbor Lights was designed to have everything a couple needs for the perfect Caribbean getaway. Overlooking Coral Bay Harbor on Seagrape Hill. Great water views of the Harbor and Hurricane Hole. The property is blessed with gentle easterly trade winds so even the summer months are comfortable.

Enjoy your morning coffee on the porch or your favorite cocktail after a restful day on one of St. John's breathtaking powder white beaches. Relax in the beautiful 20 foot tiled pool that gets plenty of sun, and is always a comfortable temperature.

Full kitchen with a built in radiant 2 burner cooktop, full-size refrigerator, blender, microwave, toaster oven, dishwasher, coffee maker, and Weber gas grill. The living space is appointed with very comfortable king mahogany four poster bed, air-conditioning, and private open-air stone and tile shower with a view!

Beach chairs and beach towels provided. Great for honeymoons or romantic getaways. Maho beach is only a 8 min. drive.

properties.descriptionHtml:
A Relaxing Couples Getaway

In Harmony Retreat is a luxurious, one-bedroom villa on Seagrape Hill in Coral Bay, St. John. Perfect for honeymooners. From this stunning hilltop, you can see from the town of Coral Bay, with its beckoning restaurants and bars, to the shores and mountains of the British Virgin Islands across the sea. Sit on one of your private balconies, bask in the dipping pool-spa, or relax in your air-conditioned villa. The choice is yours.

In Harmony is just minutes from the famous pristine beaches of the National Park. Hike the park’s trails or dive into the warm waters. There is plenty to do only a phone call away, such as hiking, kayaking, diving, snorkeling, swimming, and fishing. Not only is there plenty to do, there is also plenty not to do. In Harmony Retreat is so comfortable you may not want to leave. Inside In Harmony, you will find custom-built cypress-wood walls, cable television, and high-speed Internet access.

Enjoy the Caribbean-style four-poster bed. Make yourself at home in the state-of-the-art kitchen, replete with hand-crafted cabinetry and stainless steel appliances. Have a private chef or masseuse come up to spoil you.

Outside you can grill on the barbecue, or lounge in the dipping pool-spa. Look down on half a dozen islands or read a book under a palm tree. Pick your new favorite tropical flower from the unique island landscaping. Watch the sun set in breathtaking shades of pink and yellow or the moon rise over the Caribbean at midnight. Count the shooting stars and the wishes you make on them.

Be in harmony with nature. Be in harmony with yourself. Be in harmony with life.

properties.reviewsHtml:
Perfect Island Retreat!

In Harmony Retreat is a perfect house for two people. The view is spectacular, the sunrises stunning! The house is equipped with everything you would need and if there is anything that you can't find, Paul, the manager will have it to you immediately. There are two decks, one covered, one not - the uncovered one gives you the hot tub, the view and two chaise lounges to lay on at night and watch for shooting stars! We spent a wonderful 10 days here and hope to be back! - Terriwags

Awesome!!!

Ditto to all the good points that other reviewers made. This is a roomy and comfortable cottage for two people with nice decor, great outdoor space and a FABULOUS view. I do not think the pictures on the website do justice to the view. The washer and dryer were a big plus for us since we were moving to Cruz Bay for the second week and only had to pack carry on. It took me a few days to relax with the switchbacks but the cottage is literally a two minute drive from Skinny Legs. Paul, the manager, lives next door and was great, he will take care of any problems that pop up. We wanted to rent it for the same time next year but it was already booked. - PatrickMcc

properties.descriptionHtml:
At the same time, the location offers easy access to Cruz Bay via the ‘dollar bus’. Car rentals are optional. Separate and autonomous, living is simple and independent. The tidy and serene studio is arranged for comfort. The arched door frames your view of the surrounding lush tropical mountain landscape.

Enjoy basking in the splendor of the outdoors on the spacious wrap-around deck perched on the upper level to catch the constant island breezes. Island Gardens driveway is on level ground and makes for trouble-free access and parking.

Local landmarks including Skinny Legs, and Jolly Dog, are all within easy walking distance. Enjoy plenty of nightly entertainment. You’ll pass the local grocery store and several gift shops along the way—all a simple 5-minute walk. Yoga classes convene several times a week at the Calabash Boom Housing (hitch a ride with the owner/ Marcia). Or if Pilates is your preference, classes are available at the Agricultural Pavilion. The VITRAN passes hourly. Two-thirds of St. John is a U.S. national park with historic ruins, protected beaches, and hiking trails.

Boating, snorkeling, fishing, windsurfing, paddle boarding, surfing, and scuba diving are just some of the adventures that await you. Catch the island shuttle bus, to world-class beaches for the day. Hike the many trails on the eastern end of St. John, or head to the bustling town of Cruz Bay–for a dollar. Bars and restaurants, quaint boutiques and island ferry excursions are all conveniently located to the studio.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Intimate getaway or affordable family gathering, the first floor of our newly completed island home is perfect for your carefree tropical vacation. The tidy and serene studio is arranged as a separate and independent living space and can accommodate two couples or a family of four. The airy, comfortable studio invites sights and sounds of a tropical paradise. Three sets of French doors frame your view of the surrounding lush and seductive mountain landscape. Enjoy basking in the splendor of the outdoors on the spacious wrap-around deck. Our grotto-inspired bathroom evokes the island’s history of stonework and exemplifies our love affair with outdoor living. Sun-drenched yet private, the enclosed shower offers a luxurious bathing experience.

Situated on the level ground makes for trouble-free access and parking. The local grocery store, mail service, and restaurants, including local landmark Skinny Legs, are all within easy walking distance.

Enjoy plenty of nightly entertainment–a simple 5-minute walk. Yoga classes convene several times a week at the Agricultural Pavilion, a short walk from the house. Or if Pilates is your preference, classes are available at the same convenient location. Catch the VITRAN, the island shuttle bus, to world-class beaches for the day, hike the many trails on the eastern end of St. John, or head to the bustling town of Cruz Bay–for a dollar. Bars and restaurants, quaint boutiques and island are all conveniently located to the studio.

The eco kitchen includes a single/double burner propane camp-stove, countertop convection oven, microwave, a full-size refrigerator with freezer on top (on deck) as well as a convenient bar refrigerator (inside) and sinks with running hot/cold water. Cooking Utensils Provided. Enjoy Coral Bay, St John in the US Virgin Islands.

Ocean Garden with Hot Tub offers Spectacular Views of Ocean Bays and Islands all the way to St. Croix. This villa is nestled in the hills with a garden walk to Hot Tub/Spa.

The bedroom is appointed with a hand-carved mahogany, queen bed and offers direct access to the veranda. The living area offers a comfortable seating area, fully equipped kitchen, and sliding glass door to the veranda with a gas BBQ grill.

​Off the veranda, a few steps down leads you through a tranquil garden walk through 20' tall boulders to a private hot tub. Surround yourself with the natural beauty of this tropical retreat.  If desired there is air conditioning. However, the trade winds offer an airy, cool breeze if you prefer not to use the air conditioning.

After a day at the beach and exploring the island, sit back, have a glass of your favorite beverage, and breathe in the sights of the ocean from your private veranda or SPA.

Sun, Moon & Stars Villa is located high on a hill above Calabash Boom in Coral Bay, reached by a winding country road, so the elevation and the balmy breezes usually keep the temperature at this property very comfortable, and provide the incredible views you’ll always remember. Behind you is National Park land. Located on the quiet side of St. John, but Coral Bay’s bars, restaurants, and small shops are just a couple minutes’ drive down the road.

This charming eco-friendly villa commands a fantastic view of St. John’s pristine East End and the many British Virgin islands and cays beyond, all dramatically staged against the vast blue backdrop of ocean and sky.

Sun, Moon & Stars Villa is a one-bedroom home just perfect for couples. Built all on one level for easy access, this villa offers a well-equipped kitchen and a spacious dining and living area with a cathedral ceiling, and an air-conditioned queen bedroom.

Relaxation and a good meal for two go together, so the wide covered veranda is furnished with a cushioned sofa and a table and chairs for alfresco dining; it’s shaded and cool by day and frames the sky at night for romantic stargazing. The private pool is 11′ x 20′ with nighttime underwater light. Beautifully furnished in comfortable island style, this lovely and private villa is cozy, welcoming and provides the perfect vacation spot for couples young and old.

properties.reviewsHtml:
Top of the world

Sun, Moon & Stars is stunning. The view is unsurpassed. The house has everything you might need for the beach—beach bag, cooler, towels, umbrella. The kitchen is also fully stocked. We loved soaking in the hot tub first thing in the morning and last thing at night. Both the owner and the manager gave us very detailed and accurate directions. Coral Bay is the best end of the island…laid back and full of great people. - Elaine P.

Perfect Off The Grid Vacation

We had a wonderful time. The home was On TOP of a mountain with commanding views. A 4×4 is necessary and a willingness to climb switchbacks. But once you are at the top it’s all fabulous. House was well appointed. Kitchen was used every night since we decided we would not be driving after sunset. Local Dolphin Market has everything you need- or take a ride to Cruz Bay and stock up at the Starfish market. Plenty of towels and chairs to take to the beach. Just bring your bathing suit and flip flops. Our favorite beach was Jumbie Beach next to Trunk but get there early -only 7 parking spots for that hidden gem. Property manager was easy to contact and showed us around the house upon arrival. Views are fantastic and it was fun to watch the sunrise every morning.

Tip to travelers- we had to add an international plan to our phones since the cell service in Coral Bay (for Verizon) comes from the BVIs.  -Sheryl H.

Simply amazing

Couldn’t have asked for a more perfect home, and vacation at that! This was our second trip to the island for a vacation (4th if you include two day excursions while cruising) and it was obvious to us Coral Bay is our preferred atmosphere. It was way more laid back and quiet than Cruz. This house enabled us to see more than we could imagine off the covered porch; the views are out of this world and having the sliding glass and screen doors made the breezes incredible! Although it had a beautiful pool and hot tub, the breezes cooled us off perfectly to where we didn’t need to use the pool, but the hot tub was used almost every day for an evening soak after long hikes. If you’re active, try doing as many trails as possible. That’s what sets St. John apart in our opinion! We also recommend visiting Hansen Bay and kayaking out to Lime Out—a green house boat) which serves drinks, amazing tacos, and merchandise (which you can see from this home’s view)!

It was great having the conveniences of towels, beach equipment, leftover bug spray, etc. So sad to have had to leave but we definitely have plans to come back with family in the coming years. However if ever it’s just the two of us, we will not have a doubt we will be back to SMS!  - Robert J.

Welcome to your dream destination where views and amenities abound! This cottage, located in Coral Bay, is perfect for two and will accommodate up to four adults with guest 3 and 4 in the loft queen bed.

The air-conditioned main bedroom has a Queen bed, it’s own bathroom, it’s own deck and is separate from the living area upstairs. The upper deck provides a casual seating area coupled with “al fresco” dining for four while the lower sun deck is just outside the primary bedroom; both providing a scenic view of the sailboats coming to harbor in Coral Bay.

properties.descriptionHtml:
White Seagull is Just For Two- Elegance at a great price!

Perched atop the hillside in Great Cruz Bay, White Seagull has views of Chocolate Hole, Hart Bay, and Great Cruz Bay from your living room. Watch the sunrise in the morning and set at night, a unique feature for homes on St. John. Take in the sprawling views of St Croix and St. Thomas, the other two U.S. virgin islands, from your personal rooftop balcony while the tropical breezes keep you cool.

Designed and built with love, the details of this studio are like no other because your space is not limited to the one-room suite. There are 3 levels for you to enjoy: The Primary Studio, the upper private Sky Lounge that is only accessible through your space, and the lower courtyard that is shared with the owner's residence.

This Primary Studio is a one-room suite tastefully furnished with a gorgeous hand-carved Mahogany King bed, and treasured heirloom antiques that draw you into the historic charm of the region. The well-appointed living room area will make you feel like royalty. The suite is divided by sliding French doors separating the bedroom/living area from the kitchenette and bathroom. The kitchenette is equipped with everything you need to create a special meal or a lunch for the beach.

The Private Sky Lounge has views that are simply stunning day or night. Savor your favorite drink or frosty tropical beverage while gazing far beyond the shores. At night, stargaze or view the sparkling lights of St. Thomas – how romantic!

The lower level Courtyard provides a lap pool to float your cares away in the refreshing waters while taking in the ocean views. There you’ll also find a BBQ grill for preparing a delicious meal to start your evening activities. The owner's home is adjacent to the courtyard for convenient access to local knowledge and assistance, should you need any. Parking is private off-street beside the ornate double wooden doors to the courtyard gracing the entrance to your studio.

This hilltop accommodation is located only 1.2 miles from the town of Cruz Bay and about 5 minutes to the North Shore beaches. St. John is known for the 4-wheel drive Jeeps. We drive on the LEFT and fun driving up and down roads, around curves at slow speeds of 20 to 30 miles per hour. Getting to your studio is easy with paved roads and the private off-street parking area is easy to access.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Welcome to the Windwardside Guest Cottage, a charming little cottage that enjoys gorgeous views of the east end of St. John, the neighboring British Virgin Islands and Coral Bay. This home can be rented in conjunction with the Main House at Windwardside or alone as your own little piece of paradise.

We have numerous storage areas in a compact home with a a view that rivals any on the island. At Windwardside Guest Cottage you will wake up in a four poster bed to a gorgeous view of the Caribbean sea framed by palm trees. You could easily create a post card from the view of this adorable cottage. The interior has a queen-size, four-poster bed, a small seating area, a kitchenette and a breakfast bar. The furnishings are both tasteful and cheerful.

Our goal in designing Windwardside Guest Cottage was to provide a romantic haven packed with amenities but at a reasonable price. We have many honeymoon guests that choose Windwardside Guest Cottage for precisely this reason.

It is a budget home that won’t make you feel like you have made any compromises. But the cottage is not only for honeymoon couples – it is a quaint and lovely cottage for any visitors to the island that want an intimate experience of our beautiful island with a gorgeous view. A small gas grill is also available if you prefer to prepare your meals overlooking the sea. The covered porch has a dining area and two lounging chairs where you can enjoy the trade winds or a good book while watching the sailboats pass by. A shower garden opens onto an uncovered deck. There you can have a relaxing evening soak in the hot tub under a starry Caribbean sky. The hot tub also has a wide view of the sea and total privacy.

Windwardside is managed by on island owners. We will meet you on arrival, arrange for discounted car rentals and provide the personal attention you need to make your stay with us as pleasant and relaxing as possible. We can also arrange for a driver to meet your flight for the 50 minute ride to the Red Hook ferry dock.

In short, Windwardside Guest Cottage offers a serene location, fabulous view, charming furnishings, a private hot tub, kitchenette and BBQ, plus dedicated staff that will organize your vacation from start to finish all for the price of a hotel room.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Welcome to Windwardside, an elegant retreat with lovely furnishings, a beautiful view and lush tropical gardens. It is the most intimate and traditional of all of our homes In Coral Bay. The design is reminiscent of a bygone era in the Caribbean but the amenities are modern and designed for comfort. My husband (a retired builder on the island) and I designed this home. We have years of experience of offering visitors to the island an unusual experience that brings them outside of their day to day life but is a comfortable and welcoming home away from home. Recent renovations to the house have added much to its beauty and charm.

This traditional West Indian style home consists of multiple buildings with a large central courtyard. The main house consists of two buildings: the first is a detached bedroom/bathroom with a veranda that looks over the courtyard, gardens and sea; the second is the “great house”.

Our kitchen is small but extremely well appointed. Windwardside (in conjunction with the neighboring Guest Cottage) has always been my choice when we have had family visiting so it is well set up for any meals you wish to enjoy in the comfort of the villa. You will find all the equipment you need to prepare your meals at home including a high quality gas grill. For those who prefer to take a break from cooking on their vacations there are numerous restaurant within a few miles from the villa. Our staff will be happy to tell you about the offerings both in Coral Bay and Cruz Bay.

The charming detached bedroom has a four poster bed and opens onto a relaxing verandah. Fill the coffee pot the night before and surprise your partner with coffee on the verandah as a romantic way to start the day.

The primary bedroom has a full bath with a shower located in an enclosed shower garden that is open to the sky but totally private. If the weather doesn’t allow for that (a rarity on St. John) there is also an indoor shower and full bath located off the living room.

Windwardside shares the property with the neighboring Guest Cottage. They share no amenities except the parking area and are visually obscured from one another by thick tropical foliage.


Windwardside was created to meet the desire to travel in groups with friends and loved ones yet still maintain a sense of privacy while doing so. This focus on privacy also makes it a wonderful retreat for couples. The whole complex – the Great House (master bedroom, two baths) and the guesthouse (one bedroom, one bath) can be rented as one by larger groups. Smaller groups or couples can choose from either the main house or the guest house. When rented individually privacy is assured by the orientation of the buildings and the heavy plantings screening them from one another.

Windwardside makes every attempt to protect the beautiful environment that makes it such a special place. The majority of our power is from discretely placed solar panels. Gray water from our showers is recycled to water our beautiful tropical gardens. Whenever possible we use natural cleaning products including laundry soap. As more options open we will continue to add to our green environment efforts.

Our staff are long time members of the Calabash Cottages team and will do their best to help you plan your perfect vacation from start to finish. We hope to see you soon!

Location: Coral Bay, St. John, U.S. Virgin Islands. Windwardside is located in quiet seclusion with mesmerizing views of Coral Bay, nearby islands and the Caribbean Sea. The house is situated two thirds of a mile up a little used road in Coral Bay. Surrounded by tropical plantings and marvelous vistas, you are still just a short drive to a cool splash in Salt Pond Bay or other equally inviting white sand beaches. Restaurants, shops and watersports are all available within two miles in Coral Bay. The main town on the island, Cruz Bay, is located 8 miles away. The airport is in St. Thomas which is reached via a twenty minute ferry ride. (Ferries leave every hour on the hour – ferry rates).

Please note: We never advertise on Craigslist. We will never request guests to wire money directly to our bank accounts. If you should encounter either of these please contact us directly to avoid fraud.

We can't say enough good things about our stay at Windwardside Main House. You always wonder when you rent a place to stay if it will look as good as the pictures. Well, this place was even better than we could have imagined from the pictures. The customer service provided by Diane and Fitz throughout this process (from making the reservation, through the day we left) was superb. Fitz met us at the ferry, took us to pick up our rental car, took us to the grocery store and then to the house (and was very patient while we gathered our goods at the store). Diane checked on us after a couple of days to ensure we didn't have any questions or need anything. I've never had quite an experience like that when renting a property on vacation. The house had all the necessities for cooking, had beach items (towels, chairs, coolers and snorkeling gear), was quiet, and had spectacular views. The grounds were beautifully planted, and we could sit on the porch in the morning with our coffee, taking in the view and watching all the birds. We were concerned about renting a place that didn't have air conditioning in the bedroom, but we quickly got use to it, and the ceiling fan and breezes through the screened doors and windows made it very pleasant (an added plus to having no glass windows was being able to listen to the beautiful symphony of the night creatures..it was wonderful!). Some might think the drive up to the house is a bit daunting, but after a couple of times doing it, you become a pro. We were sad to leave such a beautiful place, but hope to be back very soon, and will definitely plan on staying here again. - Donna & David

We have stayed at Windwardside Cottage for a week every year for three years now. We just got back home and are already planning our next week there. Each year, the cottage has provided a comfortable and convenient home base from which to explore the wonderful island of St. John. We travel with another couple and there is plenty of privacy for everyone as well as delightful common space for meals and relaxing in the hot tub or on the porch. The views of Coral Bay are great! If you’ve never been, you can’t imagine how delightful it is to wake up and see such beautiful ocean, sky and flowers right from your bed! - Deb & Dave

reviewEntries.quote: We can't say enough good things about our stay at Windwardside Main House. You always wonder when you rent a place to stay if it will look as good as the pictures. Well, this place was even better than we could have imagined from the pictures. The customer service provided by Diane and Fitz throughout this process (from making the reservation, through the day we left) was superb. Fitz met us at the ferry, took us to pick up our rental car, took us to the grocery store and then to the house (and was very patient while we gathered our goods at the store). Diane checked on us after a couple of days to ensure we didn't have any questions or need anything. I've never had quite an experience like that when renting a property on vacation. The house had all the necessities for cooking, had beach items (towels, chairs, coolers and snorkeling gear), was quiet, and had spectacular views. The grounds were beautifully planted, and we could sit on the porch in the morning with our coffee, taking in the view and watching all the birds. We were concerned about renting a place that didn't have air conditioning in the bedroom, but we quickly got use to it, and the ceiling fan and breezes through the screened doors and windows made it very pleasant (an added plus to having no glass windows was being able to listen to the beautiful symphony of the night creatures..it was wonderful!). Some might think the drive up to the house is a bit daunting, but after a couple of times doing it, you become a pro. We were sad to leave such a beautiful place, but hope to be back very soon, and will definitely plan on staying here again.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Welcome to Banana Sweet in beautiful Coral Bay with its quaint, funky, laid-back shops, restaurants and music scene. This is a surprisingly spacious, recently redecorated, open floor plan apartment for two, overlooking the Carolina Valley and Hurricane Hole. You can’t beat the location which is a short 15 minute drive to the beautiful North Shore beaches.

Come and enjoy the comfortable, partially covered patio with nearly constant tropical breezes while you sit by the banana trees. It is the perfect place to catch a Coral Bay sunrise while enjoying your morning coffee or dining al fresco after a relaxing day at the beach. The roomy apartment has one bedroom with a queen bed, a full bath, and a fully equipped kitchen. There is a large dining and living area which faces a wall of windows that open to an expansive view of the Carolina Valley and the historic ruins of the Carolina Estate. This mainly solar powered home is also equipped with Tesla Powerwalls which ensure constant power even in the event of an electric outage. The apartment comes outfitted with AC in the bedrooms, WiFi, TV with Dish Network, a large outdoor deck with grill, and a washer/dryer for guest use. Beach chairs, coolers, and beach towels are provided so you have everything you need for a day at the beach. If you enjoy hiking, there are many trails to enjoy that are very close by.

This lower level apartment is part of a two unit home. There is a large, flat parking area and the apartment entrance is totally private. Due to its location an SUV or Jeep is required.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Brezza di Mare features a seamless, modern design emphasizing comfort and panoramic views. The main level hosts an open-concept great room with a gourmet kitchen, dining area, and half bath, ideal for entertaining. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame breathtaking vistas of Ram Head and the Caribbean Sea. A private staircase leads down to two air-conditioned primary suites, each with a king bed, private deck, chaise lounges, and en-suite bathrooms featuring double vanities and rock showers.

Outside, the villa truly comes alive. A spacious covered outdoor living and dining area includes a sectional sofa and table for up to 10 guests—perfect for al fresco meals. The 20′ x 10′ knife-edge infinity pool and adjacent hot tub overlook the sea, while a sun deck with loungers invites relaxation. A built-in gas grill, outdoor sink, and mini-fridge make outdoor cooking effortless. Nestled at the end of a quiet road in Fish Bay, the property offers both serenity and luxury, just minutes from St. John’s pristine beaches and national park trails. The villa is at the end of its road, providing complete serenity, but is only a 12-minute drive to Cruz Bay.

Brezza di Mare is next door to its sister property, San Costanzo. For large or multi-generational groups, renting 2 bedroom/2 bathroom San Costanzo with 2 bedroom/2.5 bathroom Brezza di Mare gives guests the flexibility of privacy and time together.

Drive up Seagrape Hill to Desert Rose which offers an excellent parking platform for 2 cars. Steps lead down to an open Caribbean style private home. Desert Rose Villa is beautiful and spacious for easy living in Paradise. A great place to relax, swim and soak in the warm sunshine and watch Coral Bay go by. Only a 10 minute Drive to the most Beautiful Beaches in the World!

Take a dip in your private pool to cool down after a day at the Beach. Enjoy the large sundeck and a convenient outdoor bathroom. Sunshine all day and a covered veranda gets you out of the sun and cool off with the ceiling fans. Beautiful views of Coral Bay, Moravian Church and Bordeaux Mountain. Watch the Moon come over the Pool and the brilliant Stars dancing in the sky while sipping a Caribbean Cocktail. In the morning sit on the deck with your Breakfast and Coffee and watch the Hummingbirds and Yellow Birds greet the new day.


The Great Room with its vaulted ceiling and ceiling fans is perfect to read, listen to music, watch T.V. or do nothing at all. Enjoy cooking in our gourmet kitchen with granite countertops and new stainless steel appliances and a comfortable island to eat at. The lower bedroom opens onto the spacious covered deck and a Spiral Staircase leads to the upper Bedroom that has a Balcony that looks over the Moravian Church and out to Coral Bay. Both bedrooms have large lit closets with sliding doors that are mirrored. The bathrooms both have ceramic title murals in the showers and glass block partitions.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Fish Tales is a cute and comfortable two bedroom, 2 1/2 bath Caribbean Cottage with nice views of Fish Bay and the surrounding area out to Bovocap Point and Little St. James Island.

A short walk from the home brings you to the National Park and Reef Bay. Walk down a short trail from Fish Tales and you are on the beach, where, in calm weather, the snorkeling is great. On windier days you can watch the surfers, or hike along the beach, over the low rocks, walk along a second beach, over a trail to a third beach where the Reef Bay Sugar Mill ruins are located. You can then go up the famed Reef Bay trail to the petroglyphs.

This spacious home away from home is easily accessed via a large flat driveway. Two small steps up from Fish Tales driveway and you enter the home from a covered deck. The door leads you into the Great Room with comfortable seating, TV, DVD player, and Stereo. Cable TV and wireless internet are provided. The kitchen and dining area, as well as a half bath with full-size laundry all, flow easily off the great room. A sliding door opens up to the large covered and uncovered pool deck. At the far end of the great room is the entrance to the primary bedroom, as well as, the internal stairway to the lower bedroom.


The large primary bedroom has great views and a king size bed with a very comfortable memory foam mattress. A sliding door takes you out to the covered deck. There is a full, private, en-suite bath in the primary bedroom. The lower bedroom has a queen sized bed and a twin sized day bed with trundle that can expand the daybed into two twin beds or one king-sized bed. All mattresses are very comfortable memory foam. A private full en-suite bath, closet, and small beverage refrigerator. There is a sliding door to a private deck with views of Fish Bay.


Outside on the main level at Fish Tales is a large covered and uncovered pool deck. The dipping pool is 8 x 13 x 3, and it is surrounded by 4 chaise lounge chairs. The outside dining table with seating for six and a Weber grill provides an easy, comfortable outdoor living space. Fish Tales is quiet, comfortable, and only 15 minutes from downtown Cruz Bay. Enjoy!

properties.descriptionHtml:
Private setting. Beautiful home, serene view, pool, and tropical landscaping Miles Away is an elegant two-bedroom villa located in Point Rendezvous, only a few minutes from the shopping and restaurants of Cruz Bay. Tucked into a serene and private setting at the end of a road, this villa is perfect for honeymooners looking for privacy, two couples, or a small family. Two equally sized bedrooms are located on opposite ends of a large and airy great room, and each features a custom made, King sized teak bed and ensuite bath. When it is time for dinner – or just a cool drink – the fully appointed kitchen is a cook’s dream. Just outside is a lovely private pool, and the decks provide relaxing spots for sun lovers and shade seekers alike, with the peace and serenity of Ram’s Head in the distance, Fish Bay down in front, St. Croix off to the right, and the National Park mountains to the left. While the easterly sea breezes keep the home comfortable, there is air conditioning throughout, with individual controls in each room. Solar panels and a battery backup system keep the electricity flowing if the power goes out. All rooms, decks and the pool are on the same level, so there are no steps to climb. If exercise is on your list of things to do, walk down to Fish Bay, to Klein Bay or Ditleff Point. The pool will be there to cool you off upon your return! When you are ready to explore St. John the National Park beaches and snorkeling are just a short drive from Miles Away.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Orchid Garden is your romantic getaway on St. John. A Greek Morrocan style villa overlooking the aqua blue Caribbean sea. Relax, enjoy, unwind, and be inspired at Orchid Garden. Located within 20 minutes walking distance to a white sandy beach and bird sanctuary.

A tropical 0asis of nature. Exotic orchids, coy fish ponds, and many beautiful indigenous plants surround you. A private world of exotic treasures from the Far East of Ric and Lolita (owners of Now @ Zen stores on St. John).

Million dollar views of the BVI’s, East end, St. Croix and endless 245-degree views of sea, sky, islands, sunrise, moonrise and spectacular clouds and rainbows. Frigates, pelicans, and Seahawks glide by and watch the bay below for the humpback whales which migrate through every winter.

Ric and Lolita have been traveling throughout Asia for over 24 years and have built their home around their art. Once you experience the beauty and tranquility of Orchid Garden you will come back for more. Private masseuse and caterer can be arranged ahead of time.

Even though we are a 2 bedroom we prefer to rent to one couple only to keep the feeling of a romantic getaway with peaceful surroundings. We were called Buddha Garden but changed the name to Orchid Garden because we are passionate about collecting orchids.

The owners are available in the apartment down below if any problems arise. You have your own private entrance and total privacy. Spectacular cloud watching, sunset afterglow from flat Mediterranean roof shade pagoda. Bring your body leave your stress behind. Love, peace, happiness

properties.descriptionHtml:
High atop Mamey Peak you will find SAPPHIRE PEAK, formerly known as Apito. The mid-island location and proximity to National Park Beaches makes this villa perfect to enjoy all of St. John. Amazing views of Bordeaux Mountain, Coral Bay, East End, Norman Island, Peter Island and beyond are visible inside and poolside from SAPPHIRE PEAK. Upon entering the great room, the large picture window takes advantage of showcasing the Caribbean view. Vaulted ceilings in the main floor level with rich wood tones add to the beauty of the space. The fully-equipped kitchen and the option of a 2 seat peninsula or a 4 seat balcony table are perfect for enjoying meals before or after your beach days. The triple water filtration system and automatic generator are a bonus to island living. The amenities include smart TVs and internet connection available in every room. One bedroom opens off the main floor living room offering a king bed, plenty of storage, ceiling fan, washer and dryer and a luxurious bathroom. A second spacious king suite is located poolside with an equally beautiful bathroom and large walk in shower. Though rarely needed on Mamey Peak, the villa is fully air-conditioned. After a day of fun and sun, a refreshing dip in the pool will leave you feeling re-energized for a delicious dining experience at one of St. John’s wonderful restaurants. Or you could have a local chef come cook for you while you relax and take in the views. The breezes atop Mamey Peak will keep you cool even on the hottest of nights. The sounds, scents, and sights of nature abound at SAPPHIRE PEAK. Tropical flowers, birds, tree-frogs, gentle trade winds, a million stars in the night sky, inspiring vistas of blue sea, sky, and green mountains are what make this location of St. John the perfect getaway. SAPPHIRE PEAK sits on almost an acre of lush pristine Caribbean paradise. SAPPHIRE PEAK’s mid-island location is ideal and unique… A quick 15 min. drive from Cruz Bay (all paved roads), a 10 min. drive to Coral Bay, and 5 min. drive to St. John’s legendary powder white North Shore Beaches. Reef Bay trail is only 5 minutes away. The lower bedroom is accessed by circular exterior steps. Not ideal for young children. 4WD is required for the bumpy road to the house. The house has AC and no screens in the windows.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Sea Palace Retreat is a private, over the top comfortable, fully loaded 2 bedroom, 2.5 bath rental villa, for you to enjoy the most amazing vacation the beautiful island of St. John has to offer.

Located in Coral Bay, which was placed #4 by New York Times Top 52 Places to Visit in 2016, is the quieter, more preferred side, most return travelers little secret, away from the busier Cruz Bay side. Due to the success of it’s neighboring, totally private  In Harmony Retreat- a relaxing, couples one bedroom rental next lot over, the owner was encouraged to have a 2 bedroom, so his large number of return guests wish to travel with another couple or family member, they could have something to accommodate.

Sea Palace Retreat unique design has modern, rustic, Gothic, and even castle like characteristics with ruin touches of historic St. John. It is a solid concrete/ stone, non-creaky, well built vacation villa with all the amenities one could need on for a relaxing vacation.

The beautiful, Caribbean style, custom stone work throughout, granite and marble counter tops, and vanities, Italian porcelain tile, stoned outdoor shower in the primary bath to waterfall like glass in lower level bathroom, guests will enjoy comfort and unique features. A large, flat screen, smart TV with free Netflix and high speed internet are provided in the main living room as well as Cable TV with VCR and movies in bedrooms and lower lounge.

A modern, gourmet kitchen and a handy lower level kitchenette will make any one who likes or dislikes to cook on vacation, content.

There are two powerful air conditioners, one in each bedroom that can handle either entire floor if desired, but most guests get enough cool from the soothing, gentle trade winds, where this home is located on Seagrape Hill.

A beyond normal, huge spaced deck with bar, comfy outdoor furniture and stoned powder room, to enjoy the simply amazing, never ending views.

One can get plenty of sun as well on the lower, large, sun deck. Enjoy the fun, enticing, refreshing salt pool to sit or lounge( no dried out hair/ skin) or step into the warm, rejuvenating, spa pool under the vast starry sky at night.

There is a barbecue grill and picnic bench for fun backyard cookouts ( one of the few rental that has a yard) with infinity views and even an outdoor shower in front, to wash off from beach. Pick fresh fruit & herbs from the surrounding Caribbean fruit trees or have an romantic dinner on the two top along the deck railings, just like the top restaurants.

Paved roads right up to villa. The home can be rented as a 1 level primary suite bedroom with lower pools and decks or bring along another couple, friend or family member to enjoy the 2nd bedroom level with separate entrance pathway along side of house or use the wide, spiral stairs. There is enough communal space for all to spend time or escape and have their private time. No children and only teenagers over 16. One or two couples are preferred but additional bedding can be provided for more than 4 with a charge. The owner is experienced in vacation management, having owned and managed several, he knows what renters need and and desire. Come discover this amazing, brand new rental, to serve as your deluxe tropical vacation retreat. Calendar is filling up fast with this new addition to St. John, the wait is over, open for your travel needs-a memorable, relaxing, comfortable vacation with all the bells and whistles, in a prime location! If next door In Harmony Retreat happens to be available, you could rent both places to be close to your travel companions as well, but private. Sea Palace Retreat has it all- to retreat and get away from it all!

properties.reviewsHtml:
Sea Palace Retreat is just perfect!

Sea Palace Retreat is in an ideal location on Seagrape Hill (above Skinny Leg's) in Coral Bay.  It is easy to get to on an all paved road, has great parking, and the views are amazing.  Everything about the house is perfect.  I can't think of one thing I would change!

Greg has the house stocked with everything you would need from beach towels and coolers to ice packs for the coolers to games, binoculars, paper towels, toilet paper, garbage bags, cleaning supplies, etc.  Also check out the bar to see what is there before you buy alcohol.

The upstairs and downstairs are like their own separate places, but he doesn't rent them separately.  The bed downstairs is a queen and upstairs is a king.  The downstairs had it's own mini kitchen and smaller refrigerator (not a mini-fridge).  More people could sleep there in the additional room.  The bathrooms were perfect and upstairs has an outdoor shower.  The pool and warming tub were perfect and the views from them were awesome!!!!

We spent most of our time there either on the upstairs porch (which had awesome breezes and a 1/2 bath) or in the pool.  We did spend one evening on the downstairs patio in the hammock and lounge chairs.  The views are fabulous of both Coral Bay and East End!  Oh to be back there right now!

One other thing, this was our fourth time renting from Greg Kinslow and we absolutely love him!  He is a top notch guy who takes excellent care of his properties.  He lives below a nearby property, and he is basically invisible unless you need him and then he just appears :)  We hope to rent from him for many years to come!

properties.descriptionHtml:
Welcome to Villa Madeline ~ a cozy hillside villa with beautiful stone and mahogany wood work. Located in the quiet Eden neighborhood with gorgeous views overlooking Coral Bay. Less than a 2-minute drive or a short walk to the heart of Coral Bay’s restaurants and shops! The location is ideal for spending the day either out at Maho or the East End beaches, which are both a 10 minute drive away. Skinny Leg's, Dazey's Bayhouse, and the Coral Bay dinghy dock are all a short walk from the villa as well. You will find everything you need for a wonderful vacation.

The road leads up to a paved driveway with plenty of room for parking. Hard to find on St. John! Full kitchen is equipped with all you will need for those nights you wish to dine in. The water at Villa Madeline is filtered and treated with a UV light and is ready right out of the faucet for your enjoyment. No need for plastic water bottles here! Located off of the kitchen is a half bath and laundry room equipped with a full-sized washer and dryer for your use. The open-air living area extends from the kitchen where you will find your in-home entertainment. Dish TV and Wi-Fi included. The main living area is equipped with A/C and also features two large screened slider doors that look out over Coral Bay and allow the trade winds to circulate throughout. Exit through the glass sliders out onto the wrap around porch on the upper level where you can enjoy coffee in the morning while watching the sunrise over East End. The villa is also equipped with solar panels and a backup battery so in the event of an island power outage, you can still enjoy all of the amenities.

Exterior staircase takes you to the pool deck and lower-level bedrooms. Private pool overlooks Coral Bay. On the pool deck you will also find an outdoor shower with beautiful stonework as well as a bar area with gas grill for dining al fresco. Descend the steps a little further to reach the two lower bedrooms. Each bedroom is equipped with queen size beds, en-suite bathrooms and individual A/C units. Slider doors off of the bedrooms lead out onto the lower-level wrap around porch. The villa is perfect for one or two couples!

properties.descriptionHtml:
Stunning ocean views are the first sight for the Waterklip visitor. Entering from the quite street above, through the impressive electronic gate, guests meander down a graceful stone walkway, where the first smiles bloom with the sight of the welcoming pool and patio, overlooking the splendid turquoise sea. Located on the south-west end of St. John, within minutes of Cruz Bay boasts all the amenities necessary for a Caribbean holiday.

Compact, comfortable and complete, Waterklip is a perfect retreat for couples or small families. The spacious pool deck contains reclining chaise lounges for the sun worshipers who wish to soak up those warm sunny days. A round table with seating for four including a large umbrella is a perfect way to enjoy an afternoon lunch or candlelit dinner.

Meandering further along the balcony on the seaside of the house, guests are invited to have a seat and enjoy the fresh sea air, lingering sunsets and watch as the birds and boats entertain the beholder.


The comfortable living room with Saltillo tiles, Caribbean artwork, air conditioning, large rattan sofa with matching loveseat and glass topped coffee table beckons the guests to relax. The entrance into the primary bedroom is just beyond the living room. Gaze out to the ocean views or catch up with the news on the 32″ Flat Screen LCD TV. A large round table with seating for four is spacious enough to enjoy meals inside if you need a break from the sun. The living room, dining and kitchen areas are 27′ X 13′ with views from end to end.

A grill on the outside deck completes the kitchen amenities, equipped with all of the necessary elements for creating scrumptious meals while dining in comfort from the bar, interior or exterior tables. The breakfast bar with high stools along it outer side invites idle guests to provide company to the working chef.

WaterKlip Features:

.5 Mile to Cruz Bay, 5 minute drive

90′ Above Sea Level

750 Enclosed square feet of living space

360 Exterior square fee of decking

Nearest beach is Honeymoon

North-shore beaches are a 5-10 minute drive

The Primary Suite, contains a queen-sized bed with detailed white wicker headboard. This suite is 13″ X 13″ in size and includes nightstands on each with lamps for reading. A ceiling fan, air conditioning, comfortable sitting chair and large 7 drawer dresser with mirror complete this living space. The full bath with shower is just to the right with large walk in closet for all your Caribbean attire.

The Cabana Guest Suite, opening off of the pool deck, offers a relaxing and cool respite. This suite is 13′ X 13′ in size, and includes two twin beds for singles or they can be converted into a king for a couple. While air-conditioning and a ceiling fan assure the occupant’s comfort, a full bath and shower, along with a night stand, lamp, boom box and comfy wicker chair supply the rest off what is needed for an enjoyable stay.

Located in exclusive Point Rendezvous, Arco Iris boasts panoramic views of the Caribbean Sea that will take your breath away. Your mornings will never be the same once you experience the Sunrise over stunning Fish Bay. This striking Villa offers a chance to “get away from it all” but is just ten minutes from the amazing dining, shopping, and activities of Cruz Bay and only 14 minutes from the Northshore Beaches. Arco Iris features three equal-size king bedrooms with air-conditioning. Each room has en-suite bathrooms, individual balconies/patio and fabulous views of Fish Bay. You will also enjoy the private indoor/outdoor showers that allow you to gaze into the Caribbean. The fully air-conditioned large open-concept great room and kitchen takes entertaining to a new level. Four sets of sliding glass doors frame the room allowing you to admire the view from anywhere in the room. A wide covered balcony wraps the great room creating true indoor/outdoor living spaces. You will look forward to sharing meals on the balcony while soaking in the ambiance. A 10 x 20 saltwater swimming pool featuring a 6-foot-long swim up seating bench is the centerpiece of the tiled outdoor-patio. This spacious area is furnished with chaise loungers, a comfortable conversation seating set and an outdoor Ping Pong Table for your entertainment. For your convenience, a large closet contains beach chairs, coolers, a beach umbrella and an assortment of masks and snorkels. Easy access driveway with driveway with around and ample parking spaces awaits your arrival.

properties.descriptionHtml:
At Astral Villa, you will enjoy traditional West Indian charm with understated elegance. You will be surrounded by nature with an incredible, ever-changing Caribbean view, tropical breezes, and magical night sounds with stars galore.

This welcoming luxury St. John Villa located in Coral Bay comfortably sleeps 6 guests with ample privacy for all. Enjoy the comfortable teak furnishings for sunning next to the palm lined pool, or curl up and read under shady overhangs, surrounded by colorful tropical flowers. No matter where you are on property, you look up to a beautiful panoramic view.

Astral Villa is designed with privacy in mind. The 3 Pavilions are separated by lush vegetation, and there are cozy seating areas tucked away throughout the property – all with fabulous views. Enjoy lazy private mornings with coffee and tropical breezes. In the evening, enjoy magical night sounds with a galaxy of stars twinkling above. Champagne optional.

This welcoming luxury St. John Villa located in Coral Bay comfortably sleeps 6 guests with ample privacy for all. Enjoy the comfortable teak furnishings for sunning next to the palm lined pool, or curl up and read under shady overhangs, surrounded by colorful tropical flowers. No matter where you are on property, you look up to a beautiful panoramic view.

The living area is furnished with modern comfortable seating, TV, ROKU, Bluetooth soundbar, and DVD player. The dining and sitting room provides ample seating for 6 or more, opens into the great room and outdoor pool terrace. A beautifully appointed, cooks’ kitchen with updated appliances and custom mahogany cabinetry.

The main primary bedroom with custom made queen bed and opens to outdoor pool terrace, with spa for nighttime star gazing. The en-suite bathroom boasts both indoor and outdoor showers. The upstairs primary bedroom has a queen bed and ensuite bathroom. The downstairs primary has a split king bed, conveniently converting into 2 twins, if desired, and en-suite bathroom.

Soak in all the natural beauty Astral Villa has to offer on the cozy balcony with steamer chairs. There is also a bistro set to enjoy peaceful morning coffee with your view. There are loungers for sunning and a swing hammock. The wraparound deck leads to a second whirlpool spa for private star gazing and beautiful, unobstructed views of Coral Bay from all vantage points.

Located in exclusive Pt. Rendezvous, Cara Mia shows off pristine views of Fish Bay, Bordeaux Mountain, and the Caribbean Sea. This beautiful 3 king bedroom ensuites St. John Villa offers guests a welcome change of pace from the ordinary. Cara Mia is furnished in an elegant Modern Colonial motif. Cara Mia is both grand and welcoming with soaring ceilings and cool travertine floors that compliment warm mahogany details and comfortable upholstered seating in the Great Room. Crafted by local artisans from island stone and slate, Cara Mia has a charm and warmth all its own, with a covered gallery for al fresco dining. Relax in the island breezes or enjoy your meal in air-conditioned comfort with the home’s indoor or outdoor dining areas. Three equal, air-conditioned bedrooms are placed for optimum privacy, and all are oriented to take advantage of Point Rendezvous’ constant trade winds and inspiring ocean vistas, The primary suite is complete with a king size bed, and an elegant bath with an opulent shower area. The guest bedrooms offer king beds, and both are beautifully appointed and offer tasteful, oversize bathrooms ensuite. AC in Kitchen/Great Room too. Each bedroom has exterior entry, making this a serious consideration if you have young children.

properties.descriptionHtml:
East End Seascape on St. John, offering a three bedroom vacation rental accommodation with a swimming pool that has a beautiful sunrise ocean view. Each bedroom has air-conditioning and the rest of the villa is kept cool by the historic tradewinds. Perfect for your holiday or honeymoon.

Here is St John at it’s best. A private luxurious outpost perched on a cliff on the island’s tranquil East End with a breathtaking sea view in every direction. Leave stress behind on a scenic 15 minute drive from Coral Bay. The road is dotted with sparkling little beaches and panoramic vistas.

Feast your eyes and restore your soul. This three bedroom vacation rental is a perfect place for a honeymoon or anniversary retreat. Designed to accommodate up to 6 guests, it’s also fun for a family or small group of friends.

East End Seascape is like being at anchor on a private luxury yacht. Feel yourself surrounded by softly crashing surf, rocky outcrops that lead into clear swirling waters, a tranquil bay and endless sea dotted with islands stretching into the horizon.

Relax in the shade of the arch-framed deck and watch sailboats drift by below. Watch birds soar past – almost close enough to touch. Have dinner al fresco as the setting sun plays on the bay. The evening is magical. See a cruise ship glide past. Take an evening swim with the pool illuminated from within then sit on the poolside veranda under a sky chock full of stars. Fall asleep to the sea song.

properties.descriptionHtml:
The Hart Bay Beach House located directly on Hart Bay Beach and below the Hart Bay Great House was designed and built with quality lifestyle and love of beauty in mind. Wake up to the sounds of the surf from this beachside haven.

Located directly on Hart Bay Beach this home offers dramatic views of the ocean, south side of St. John, Hart Bay, Rendezvous Bay and south all the way to the white cliffs of Reef Bay and south to St. Croix. The paved driveway has space for two vehicles and a turn around. The house is surrounded by the lush tropical gardens, a private setting and one with nature.

The villa includes 3 bedrooms 3 baths, an expansive great room, ideal for entertaining, dining and casual living. The large living space includes a sofa with two chairs, floor lamps, coffee table, complete entertainment center including wall mounted 50″ TV, with cable and streaming services, DVD player, and Blue Tooth Speaker. Wireless DLS complete this electronics package. This peaceful setting puts you at one with nature.

All furnishings are the best of quality for comfort and relaxation. The great room includes a fully equipped gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a side by side refrigerator/freezer with filtered water and ice dispensers. This area is a lovely focal point for family meals as it opens onto the spacious bar counter, with seating for four, and to the unique sculptured wood dining table with comfortable cushioned seating for six as well as 2 side chairs. The Hart Bay Beach House has 2200 square feet of spacious living.

The outside deck has open and covered areas for lounging or enjoying breakfast, lunch or dinner from the outside dining table with seating for six. Allow St. John to seduce you with her natural beauty and the Hart Bay Beach House to enrapture you with its magnificent seaside location and comfortable living areas.

Enjoy the spectacular ocean views from the expansive deck or take a stroll to the beach. From the lower primary balcony, you exit the gate and follow the pavers to the delightful sand and stone beach of Hart Bay, where you can swim, snorkeling and beachcomb. Beachfront homes on St. John are a rare and special treat and this beach is very private. The constant sounds of the ocean will make it hard to leave this amazing location!!

The spacious Primary Suite opens onto a shaded deck, where you will find 2 relaxing chaise lounges. Gaze out to the surf and the verdant green hills of St. John from your luxurious king bed or private deck.

Located on the opposite end of the great room you will find the Guest Bedroom which has 2 twin beds, a dresser, table lamp, and large closet. This set up is perfect for families with children or for singles.

Exiting the the large sliding glass doors from the Great Room, to the left you will find stairs to the second Primary Suite. This suite has outside access only.

A beautiful king bed with foot board bench, matching nightstands, lamps and a dresser as well as a walk in closet. A wall mounted 32″ TV with expanded cable is also included.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Idyllic is a completely air-conditioned, 3 bedroom home with a private pool and cabana nestled on the ridge overlooking Great Cruz Bay, just a few minutes from town and the ferry dock.

And, then there is the large pool and deck surrounded by flowering shrubs with a captivating view. The comfortable deck furniture, and cabana, outdoor shower, half bath and gas grill provides for easy living pool-side. Enjoy the large private pool (30’ x 11’ x 4’) with outdoor rinse shower


The indoor living area is furnished in cool, island colors, with wrapped sea grass furniture and artwork complimenting the natural beauty of St. John. The 4 panel slider opens fully onto the upper deck and is also screened. There is a complete entertainment unit with color TV, cable, VCR/DVD and combination radio, tape/CD music system. The kitchen is a delight with all the latest appliances, gourmet pots and cooking gadgets, huge granite counter, and a breakfast bar.

Idyllic was designed to take advantage of the Caribbean breezes and incredible views of Great Cruz Bay. The covered deck across the front of the house provides protected outdoor living space with seating and dining areas. The beautiful teak dining table set seats 6 in comfort.

After relaxing in the pool, you’re sitting on the deck looking at the view, a harbor replete with boats, Pillsbury Sound, the hills of St. Thomas in the distance.

The house is fully equipped with gear for the beach – coolers, towels, and beach chairs.

Idyllic is landscaped with tropical plants such as flamboyant, bougainvillea, oleander, hibiscus, and palm trees and you can help yourself to fruits in season – bananas, tamarinds, limes, passion fruit, and more. There are sunsets year round and at night the twinkling lights and stars.

Awaken each morning to the sound of the surf, surrounded by colorful tropical foliage, and step outdoors into breathtaking Caribbean views. Welcome to Monarch Cottage, one of the most exclusive St. John USVI Luxury vacation rentals, with serene Fish Bay as your backyard. If you dream of an unforgettable island getaway where the highest level of comfort is juxtaposed against raw, natural beauty, this Private Romantic Villa on St. John is your dream destination come true.

A Slice of Caribbean Heaven

Monarch Cottage is a splendidly designed, modern West Indies–style retreat where luxury meets nature in perfect harmony. Set amidst the lush surroundings of St. John, USVI, this beautiful private home offers a setting so mesmerizing that the Caribbean Sea feels like your personal front yard. Whether one is indulging in quiet relaxation or thrilling island escapades, Monarch Cottage sets the tone for the ultimate getaway.

Perfect for couples, families, and luxe travelers.

Looking for a peaceful couples’ retreat? Monarch Cottage is a Private Romantic Villa on St. John, crafted to provide pure intimacy, privacy, and relaxation. From candlelit dinners on the terrace to sunrise coffee overlooking Fish Bay, love feels like part of the landscape here.

Planning a family or friends’ vacation? The spacious living areas, premium furnishings, and open floor design make this cottage one of the finest Private Home Weekly Rental USVI options.

Panoramic Ocean Views and Island Exploration

Monarch Cottage offers what few rentals can: St. John Homes for rent with Beachfront View, where the turquoise Caribbean waters greet you each and every morning. Only minutes from Cruz Bay, guests can enjoy world-famous beaches, snorkeling, hiking trails, restaurants, and vibrant island culture. And when you return home, you’re welcomed by a serene waterfront haven far away from the crowds.

Why is Monarch Cottage St. John USVI different?

Modern West Indies–inspired architecture

Unobstructed ocean and Fish Bay views

Luxurious interiors with island-style comfort

Ideal for romantic getaways, honeymoons, and peaceful retreats

Close to Cruz Bay – ideal for activities, restaurants, and nightlife

Exclusive privacy combined with premium concierge-level amenities

Monarch Cottage is the ultimate haven to rediscover your bond with nature, while offering a world-class luxury experience that you’ll never forget. It is the dream Caribbean escape for anyone desiring ultimate elegance, unparalleled privacy, and pure tropical bliss. For those looking for the very best of St. John USVI Luxury vacation rentals with unparalleled waterfront scenery, superior comfort, and unforgettable island surroundings, look no further than this cottage.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Escape to a tropical oasis at Palladio’s View, a stunning villa perched on the East End of St. John. Overlooking Coral Bay, this enchanting 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath retreat is the ultimate getaway, offering three luxurious king-sized beds, a private hot tub, and a sparkling pool.

With breathtaking views of the turquoise waters below, every corner of this home invites you to unwind and embrace paradise. This home is also equipped with an HVAC system, which adds an extra bit of comfort in this tropic environment! Guest’s will enjoy A/C in each bedroom, as well as the living area and kitchen.

It’s very common for the island to have power outages! Palladio’s View is equipped with backup Tesla Powerwall battery storage and solar panels to maintain all systems (except hot tub and A/C) while the local power grid is down.

Step into the spacious living area, where comfort and style meet. Plush seating and thoughtfully selected decor create an inviting atmosphere, while walls of windows bathe the room in natural light and offer uninterrupted views of Coral Bay and the British Virgin Islands.

This open, airy space seamlessly flows into the fully equipped kitchen, designed to make island living a breeze. The kitchen boasts full-sized appliances, including a refrigerator, gas stove, oven, microwave, and ample cabinet and counter space—perfect for preparing everything from casual snacks to gourmet meals. A dishwasher, coffee maker, and toaster are also provided for your convenience.

Just off the kitchen is a cozy dining area with seating for four, but we highly encourage you to dine al fresco on the expansive deck, where the tropical breezes and stunning scenery will elevate every meal.

Outside, the villa is an entertainer’s dream. The multi-level deck is designed for ultimate outdoor enjoyment, with various seating areas, including plush sofas, love seats, and dining tables. Relax in the sun loungers, take a dip in the pool, or indulge in a peaceful soak in the hot tub—this is your private paradise, where every moment is an opportunity to relax and recharge.

Pack light! We provide our guests with bath towels, washcloths, toiletries, bedding, and everything you will need to enjoy your stay. Guests will also have access to a smart TV, where they can sign into their own streaming services to enjoy (just be sure to sign out after your departure!). High-speed wifi is also available for our guests.

The first king suite is a sanctuary of relaxation, with private access to the deck and a wealth of natural light streaming in through expansive windows. A dresser and closet provide ample storage space for your belongings, ensuring you feel right at home. The en-suite bathroom is a true highlight, featuring elegant stone countertops, plenty of storage, and a shower like no other—partially open to the outdoors, offering a unique and refreshing experience in nature’s embrace. A/C is included in this room!

The second bedroom also features a king-sized bed and is located on the other side of the house from the first bedroom. From this room, you’ll wake up to sweeping views of the Virgin Islands’ lush landscape and crystal-clear waters. The en-suite bathroom mirrors the other, with a stone vanity, chic sink, and a partially outdoor shower that brings the beauty of nature indoors. A wardrobe provides additional storage, ensuring you have everything you need for your stay. Guests' will have cold A/C in this room as well.

Upstairs, the second bedroom is a loft-style retreat, also with a king-sized bed and plenty of space for storage in the closet and wardrobe. A half bath is located in the loft, and guests will have access to A/C in this space as well.

Palladio’s View is only 20 minutes away from some world famous beaches, including Trunk Bay, Maho Bay, and Cinnamon Bay. These are some must-see destinations during your stay with us!

properties.descriptionHtml:
Located on a spectacular point of high land that juts out over the water on St. John’s quiet East End, this spacious 3 bedroom Virgin Island villa rental overlooks Coral Bay, Haulover Bay and a beautiful reef. Proximity to the water, good snorkeling, and your own beach set this vacation villa apart from other waterfront properties on the island.

A private staircase leads down from the house to the stone beach complete with beach chairs and a hammock. Excellent snorkeling for beginners and experienced swimmers alike.  Soak in the stunning blue waters surrounding Pebble Cove. The bay offers a beautiful mix of underwater scenery, varieties of coral, and a myriad of tropical fish. Several other sand beaches, Haulover Bay and Hansen Bay, are located within a 5 to 10-minute walk from Pebble Cove.


Pebble Cove sleeps up to eight people. The living room provides stunning 220-degree views of sparkling bays and green mountains. Sliding doors allow for a gentle cross-breeze to keep the house cool. Additionally, it offers Wi-Fi, a quiet A/C, and a flat screen television with ROKU. A powder room tucked underneath the stairs offers a main room bathroom near the kitchen, dining, and living areas.

The kitchen is equipped with a propane stove and oven, dishwasher, refrigerator and freezer, beverage mini-fridge, microwave, toaster, a coffee maker with filters, filtered tap water, and complete cooking and dining utensils. A propane grill is located just outside the kitchen down a few stairs. Enjoy a romantic dinner on the deck while enjoying the view.


The spacious primary king bedroom, equipped with an air conditioner, opens onto its own deck for sunrise views, stargazing, or sunbathing. Stairs from the deck lead down to the main deck or to the beach. A large double vanity bathroom with a shower, dressing table and laundry room adjoins the primary bedroom.

The guest bedroom has a private entrance and offers a king size bed with sliding glass doors that open onto a private deck that boast sunset and water views. This room is equipped with A/C. Right off the courtyard is the guest bathroom that has a large double vanity with a garden shower overlooking the beautiful Caribbean waters.

The lower bedroom is down one flight of stairs from the main floor and can be prepared with two twins or a king. This room offers A/C. The room opens up onto a covered alcove sitting area and offers a garden shower with a single vanity open air bathroom. Steps to the beach are off the covered alcove.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Sea Grape Estates is finally available and waiting for your arrival! As seen on House Hunters International multiple times. Enter into your own little resort in itself, with one of the largest pools and pristine properties in Coral Bay, never before available to the public.

Located in Coral Bay on Seagrape Hill across from Skinny Legs, Shops and the Dingy Dock making it an easy hop for a sail or power boat charter.

The Estate is situated on a hill, so you may enjoy the Caribbean breeze and unobstructed breathtaking views from sunrise to sunset from the large wrap around deck and gazebo, perfect for enjoying any meal, as well as the incredible star gazing and moon rises over the water at night. Perfect for a romantic week away from the city, or go big with larger groups or events.

We have upgraded the pool with improvements and converted to salt water, and the upper deck now has cable rails to improve the view.

Begin your relaxing get away in our beach style home, including 2 oversized primary bedrooms with private entries, upgraded full-size bathrooms, comfortable king size beds, and updated kitchen. Updates include luxurious large granite counter tops, sinks, stainless steel refrigerator, oven, gas stove, microwave, and toaster oven/broiler with extended peninsula. Dining at the round table inside seats 6, bar area seats 4.

The lounge area is equipped with a 48″ smart TV and boasts large windows with stunning ocean views. The main area is equipped with 48″ smart TV, while the primary suites and cottage have 40″ and 32″ smart TVs , respectively. All bedrooms have air conditioners.

Also available, rent our private poolside cottage with queen size bed, bathroom, outdoor shower, mini fridge, and breakfast nook, for more guests.

Besides the stunning views, enormous bedrooms with beautifully appointed bathrooms and kitchen, you will have a hard time deciding where to hang side for a swim, upper deck for happy hour or sunrise,  or an unforgettable moon rise. The property speaks for itself.

Coral Bay is the new hot spot on the island, known for its up and coming restaurants, easily accessible beaches (5 minute drive), and laid back friendly town.

Upon arrival, you will have access to a welcome book with loads of options for food and entertainment. Rental also includes snorkel gear and beach items, beach towels, comfortable deck furniture, BBQ, and hammocks.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Built and decorated in true Caribbean style, featuring expansive views of the open sea, cooling trade wind breezes, and a huge, sprawling deck perfect for entertaining your guests, or for a private evening of stargazing. Day and night, deck views sweeping well past 180 degrees provide eye-popping vistas of the Caribbean to the south, and to the broad expanse of the Fish Bay valley.

Here, you’ll bask in the warm glow of the morning sun as it rises above hills to the east, or while away hours watching sailboats at sea, and lose yourself in hours of dream-inducing evening stargazing.

The upstairs/downstairs layout, each level with its own spacious communal living area and large deck are perfect for families with children, or separate groups of couples wishing some ‘private space’ from time to time.

The main house upstairs (entrance level) features a living/dining area suitable for eight guests. The villa owner is a dedicated amateur chef, and the kitchen is equipped accordingly, providing everything you’ll need to prepare sumptuous meals on those evenings when you’re just not up to going out.  An outdoor gas grill easily accommodates any dinner party.

Away from the hustle and bustle of town, Southern Exposure offers guests the quiet and solace that brings people to St. John in the first place. And of course, the raised deck pool, surrounded by beautiful native stone and coral walls and an array of colorful bougainvillea, Alamanda, hibiscus and palm trees, will keep both adults and kids entertained for hours.

A second, beautifully appointed primary bedroom is located inside the main house on the same level and features a private bathroom and spacious tile shower. The main living area downstairs serves as a multi-purpose entertainment room, opening out to its own private covered tile deck with lounges, tables, and chairs. It has a wet bar, small refrigerator and two futons (that can be used as beds in a pinch).

For families, it’s an ideal ‘kids room’ complete with games, TV w/VCR, and CD player. Both downstairs bathrooms are directly accessible from the living area here. There is a laundry room in the lower level with a washer & dryer.

Villa Bijou offers 3 King Suites, and 3 1/2 baths, with full A/C, lovely pool, and sundeck. Beautifully furnished, with native stonework throughout. A great house for relaxation, breathtaking views and comfort with easy access to town, dining and the north shore beaches.

Large (18′ x 10′ x 5′) heated pool and surrounding patio are private. The stone patio is furnished with a covered dining area while leaving a large sun-bathing space with loungers nearer the pool. The poolside wet bar offers granite counters, blender, fridge, and a ceiling fan.


The Living room and dining area are on the entry level with sweeping views. Each area is furnished with truly comfortable sofas and chairs. Open-air living and great breezes make for cool tropical living. There are ceiling fans throughout.

The Large gourmet kitchen has everything a serious cook could want with gorgeous granite counter tops, custom cabinetry and tons of counter space.

The two entry level primary bedrooms each have king beds with full air-conditioning, private baths and garden views as well as cable TV/DVD/VCR’s.

Our favourite spot was the gazebo, especially in the evenings watching the sun set and listening to the tree frogs sing. The villa is a quick ten minute drive into Cruz Bay and convenient to all of the amazing beaches on the north shore. We will definitely return.

properties.descriptionHtml:
This villa has it all! Beija Flor means “Flower-kisser” (hummingbird) in Portuguese. Beija Flor is located in exclusive Point Rendezvous and can sleep up to 8 people. Enjoy beautiful water views and spectacular ocean breezes. Beija Flor is 75 yards on a cliff above the beautiful blue waters of Fish Bay. Watch the stunning sunrises and enjoy dinner under the stars on the 500 square foot upper and lower balconies. Relax in the luxurious saltwater pool or swim in one of the many beaches close by. Beija Flor is just an 8 to 10-minute drive from the town of Cruz Bay where you can find amazing restaurants, shopping and other activities. The beautiful North Shore beaches are a 15-minute drive from the villa. As you walk into the great room, five double mahogany doors open onto the upper deck and provide expansive views to Fish Bay where you can enjoy sea turtles swimming and bobbing to the surface. Beija Flor features four king size bedrooms with air-conditioning and en-suite bathrooms. Two king size primary suites are located on each side off the great room. There is a handicap accessible ramp or stairs that will take you to the pool and to the two lower bedrooms with king size beds, both with sliders out to the lower deck with captivating views of Fish Bay. There is a connecting hallway with doors to each bedroom. All villa water is purified by an ultraviolet (UV) 3 stage filtration system. For your convenience, trash service is provided twice a week. A solar system provides electricity if there is an island-wide outage.

Base nightly rates vary and additional per person per night charges and other fees may apply.

To view more information, photos and reviews please visit VRBO at:

Beija Flor – Spectacular Water Views & Ocean breezes, Salt Water Pool, New Solar (vrbo.com)
