properties.descriptionHtml:
Cinnamon Stones sits high on the hillside of Estate Catherineberg, a small prestigious community of luxury villas, surrounded by the Virgin Islands National Park. Overlooking Cinnamon Bay, Peter Bay, Francis Bay and Johnson’s Reef, you can see from Hans Lollick and Lovango in the west, north to Jost Van Dyke and east to Tortola. It is a big, breathtaking view. The house is on one acre of beautifully landscaped land. The steep hillside is covered with old stones and a very special thirty foot high rock outcrop. The colors of the stone were an inspiration for the interior of the house. The house was designed by St. John architect and artist, Carolyn Caldwell, and constructed in 1999 by her husband, Ken Betts. It takes advantage of all the best features of Caribbean homes: thick concrete walls, an abundance of louvered doors on all sides, ceiling fans and cool stone floors. Skill and craftsmanship are evident throughout this very special house.

At Cinnamon Stones you are surrounded by the beauty of the woods and the sea. The house is a tribute to architectural restraint and a sensitivity to Caribbean style. It is place to love and to return again and again.

The Great Room is painted a cool gray lavender, the color of the British Virgin Islands and the sea at dawn and dusk, which you see through six louvered mahogany French doors. All the mahogany doors and windows were handcrafted on St. John. The floor is imported Italian limestone. There is a vaulted kingpost ceiling over the sitting area which has two very comfy sofas, perfect for watching a movie. The custom built mahogany entertainment center has a 40” LCD TV with Expanded Digital Cable, VCR, Blue Ray DVD Player, and Echo Dot.  Also included, is a large video and DVD library, or you may prefer choosing something to read from a collection of over 100 books of contemporary fiction – many award winners and best sellers of the past ten years. A selection of board games and cards are available under the kitchen island as well as large array of table linens for a special dinner inside or out on the veranda.  Original paintings by well known St. John artists hang throughout the house. Off the Great Room is a small office with desk, MFC printer and scanner capabilities, wireless DSL and more books. A guest bath is adjacent.

The interior dining area has a large antique teak table which can easily seat eight. The table settings include dinnerware by Villeroy and Bock, stainless flatware by Gorham. There is an abundance of serving pieces, platters, bowls and trays. A wine rack is built into the adjacent counter.

The kitchen is designed for serious cooking with all appliances including a gas stove, refrigerator/freezer with water and ice dispenser, and dishwasher. The white custom made cupboards with red hand glazed tile counter tops are filled with all the important and not so important kitchen equipment from Williams-Sonoma. Off the kitchen is a pantry for storage of large pots, pans, and picnic equipment.

Every door in the Great Room opens to the gracious verandah and the glorious blue sea and each door opening has retractable phantom screens.  The comfortable teak furniture on the verandah includes rockers, big arm chairs, a love seat and a dining table for enjoying the indescribable view.

You can sit at the end of the long verandah, in the swinging rope chair facing the rock shelter, the faint remains of stone terraced farming, the tyre palm grove, the bay rum tree and beautiful Cinnamon Beach below.

From the kitchen door it is a short walk to the Primary Suite across the pergola covered terrace with its fragrant night blooming jasmine. The pale grey walls, white woodwork and mahogany floors and doors create a beautiful space for the St. Croix four poster mahogany bed. The screened porch has a rocker and an armchair. The en-suite bathroom has a large, screened outdoor shower with a magnificent ocean view. There is a large walk-in closet for all your island attire and a 32” LCD Flat TV with expanded digital cable, Blue Ray DVD player, and Echo Dot for your viewing pleasure.

From the upper-level deck you look down on the 40' X 8' heated lap pool and hot tub. On the lower deck there are two roomy umbrellas that can be moved to shelter you from the sun as you lounge on the steps in the water.

All the decks are made of Trex, which has no splinters and is soft on bare feet. It is roomy around the pool with six lounge chairs along with additional tables and chairs. There is a laundry room off the pool deck with a washer, dryer, ice maker, ice bucket, drinkware and small refrigerator for cold drinks. There is also an adjacent full bathroom which opens onto the deck. On the lower level are two large bedrooms each with a unique bathroom and walk-in closet. The Rock Suite has a king size bed which is a copy of a plantation bed and large en-suite bath. On the mahogany table is a 32″ LCD TV with expanded digital cable, Blue Ray DVD player, and Echo Dot.  The pale blue walls glow as light filters through the mahogany louvered doors. All doors have full sliding screens so that the louvered doors may be left open, if desired.  Adjacent to the Rock Suite is the Kids Suite, with two sets of bunk beds, en-suite bath and a pass through door to the Rock Suite, a perfect set up for small children.

The beautiful lower verandah has more comfortable rockers and arm chairs with a hammock for afternoon naps.  A circular second stairway leads to the Great Room from the end of the verandah.

The Pool Suite has a king size four poster mahogany bed and en-suite bath. The room is painted soft green to reflect the tropical woods which surround the house. There is a big comfortable wicker chair with footstool perfect for watching a movie on the 32” LCD TV with expanded digital cable, DVD Player and Echo Dot, all located in the large red Chinese armoire. The bathroom is wonderful, with a large shower with mahogany louvered doors which open to the hillside garden.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Located in St. John, US Virgin Islands, and set high above Coral Bay, the Coral Sky Villa offers stunning views of Coral Bay, the British Virgin Islands, and the Bordeaux Valley. Coral Sky Villa sits on a half-acre lot and features 4 bedrooms and 3.5 baths with a floor plan designed for incredible indoor/outdoor living spaces and with privacy in mind. Coral Sky Villa is located on the prestigious Majestic Mile in the exclusive community of Upper Carolina in Coral Bay and sits 650 feet above sea level which embraces the soothing Tradewinds and spectacular views. Upper Carolina also features fully paved roads. Coral Sky Villa was newly built from the ground up in 2017. Life can be slowly savored at Coral Sky Villa, morning coffee on the decks, a rum and tonic by the pool in the tropical sun, a canopy of a million stars at night. We offer large outdoor covered patios and open sun decks with amazing views of Coral Bay and the British Virgin Islands. A gated entry leads to a beautifully landscaped villa that sits perfectly across the lot. A 25 min. drive from Cruz Bay (all paved roads), a 6 min. drive to Coral Bay, and 10 min. drive to St. John’s legendary powder white Northshore Beaches.

Base nightly rates vary and additional per person per night charges and other fees may apply.

To view more information, photos and reviews please visit VRBO at:

properties.descriptionHtml:
Drake’s View is a luxury villa that has the same vista named by the Caribbean Travel magazine as “the best view in the Caribbean” – a spectacular view of the British Virgin Islands and the East Shore of St. John. One to four couples or a large family will have ample room for privacy, and relaxation.

Drake’s View is a four bedroom, 4.5 bath villa with a tile patio, heated swimming pool, and hot tub. Four additional tile decks, a large tiled front porch, and a separate cottage terrace provide ample outdoor lounging areas. One of the bedrooms is in a separate cottage.

Drake’s View is centrally located on Bordeaux Mt., the highest point in St. John (almost 1300 feet), and is surrounded by lush vegetation. The roads leading to there are all paved and the villa is surrounded by lush local vegetation. It is a 6-minute drive to the VI National Park North Shore beaches; 3-minutes to the Reef Bay Trail; 7-minutes to Coral Bay; 15-minutes the Cruz Bay; and is one-quarter mile from Château Bordeaux, one of the island’s great restaurants. From the front door, you can hike the Bordeaux Mountain Trail to secluded Lameshur Beach in one hour. The well-equipped kitchen is very spacious and includes one of two dining areas. Three bedrooms have king sized beds and one has a king, convertible to twins. Each bedroom has air-conditioning, a private bath, and Swedish TempurPedic mattresses. All the bathrooms are the same with tiled showers and plenty of cabinet space. Two Tesla Powerwalls have been installed to make the villa more environmentally friendly, and help guests avoid any power outages during their stay.

The traditional architecture of the house entrance with yellow stucco, red roof, and simple columns contrasts with a dramatic facade of glass along the east wall. No matter where you look in the house or cottage, you see Coral Bay, the valley of Estate Carolina, Drake’s Passage, and the British Virgin Islands. On a clear day, you can see the Baths at Virgin Gorda. Rainbows, mangrove cuckoos, kestrels and red-tailed hawks are common sights.

Drake’s View has the ambiance of a home rather than a rental. The large great room is furnished with Indonesian, American antiques, and contemporary, comfortable, plantation style furniture. Local art is featured throughout the house.

This property features a cottage with separate bedroom, for added privacy.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Great Escape is located a world away in Estate Catherineburg, nestled in the national park above Cinnamon Bay. This 4 Bed/4 Bath, luxury home offers an escape from reality, but boasts the technology and creature comforts you’d expect in a 5-star resort.

Rich, contemporary Caribbean ambiance will draw you in from the moment you enter this house. Handcrafted mahogany furnishings accent this home, as stunning as it is livable. A media room is off of the main living area, for viewing the latest DVD’s or videos, or listening to your favorite island rhythms on the sound system. In addition, TVs are located in every bedroom and even the wet bar, so you never have to miss a favorite episode or major game while you are visiting paradise. The gourmet kitchen is truly a chef's delight, with state of the art appliances, custom mahogany cabinetry and sleek granite countertops.


The pool deck offers entertainment of a different kind, with a 60′ x 12′ swimming pool pool for lounging or laps. The pool features a changing light display along with color water-spouts, a very unique feature. A large hot tub equipped with its own sound system and a large relaxing hammock. On either side of the pool are gazebos, each furnished with a table and four chairs for soaking up that incredible view!

All of this, in a setting unmatched anywhere, with views to mesmerize from sunup to sundown. Enjoy all the creature comforts and the unforgettable sights and sound of the natural wonder which is St. John, here at Great Escape. This stunning property features 4 fully air-conditioned bedrooms, 2 kings and 2 queens, all designed to take advantage of the breathtaking vistas at every opportunity.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Enter a place of calm, peace and tranquility, named for the mythical bird who nested on the sea and calmed the waves. Enjoy the soothing breezes of the trade winds that blow through the house most of the time.


Halcyon Days is for those who love hiking and going to the beach, but it also makes you glad to be back to your home away from home. Relax in the spacious family room that accommodates up to ten people.

Prepare a meal in the main kitchen or on the barbecue deck and dine at a teak table that seats twelve. Lounge outside soaking in the lush surroundings in your choice of the multiple deck options. Ours is a house meant for lots of cooking, loving, and living.


Halcyon Days has four spacious bedrooms, two with their own private bathrooms. Our primary bedroom has its own intimate galley kitchen, and an open air covered porch with a view of Johnson Bay, Hurricane Hole, and Coral Bay framed by amazing Mongoose Junction style Danish stone columns. Enjoy your breakfast while watching the sailboats move in and out of Coral Bay harbor.

The other two bedrooms share a large full bathroom looking out on St. John’s East End and Tortola. All four bedrooms have their own individual air-conditioning units, should your room warm up in the afternoon.

Relax in the atrium looking out the front door to Norman Island and a national park protected fringing reef, in the shade of a Schefflera tree. Or sunbathe on the large main deck upstairs, while listening to the sound of waves breaking. Play your favorite games or enjoy happy hour in the large bricked courtyard by a refreshing fountain. Use our dumb waiter to move snacks and drinks from the main kitchen to the courtyard without having to go up and down the stairs.

You will have access to three refrigerators, a washer/dryer, two kitchens, a large stove, two convection ovens, the dumb waiter, and a large propane Weber grill. Everything you need to fix your gourmet meal is available. And if the power goes out, as it frequently does on St. John, there is a large generator that will kick on automatically and make sure you are not interrupted, whether you are cooking, playing, or working.

We are happy to share Halcyon Days with you and want you to enjoy its many pleasures and gifts as much as we do.

Rules of the House

(A) Enjoy yourself! Get on island time.

(B) Come again soon.

(C) Let us know anything you need.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Hart Bay Great House is located on the southwest end of Hart Bay. This four bedroom three and a half bath beachfront villa is a perfect villa for newlyweds, families, and small groups. Convenient to the main town of Cruz Bay, where you will find shopping, dining and the road to the famous North Shore beaches of the National Parks. Hart Bay Great House is located on Hart Bay beach.

The 45 ft. X 14 ft. pool is 52 in. deep with bench seating throughout and 3500 sq. ft. of decking. The upper and lower outside decks feature glass top dining tables with seating for six. As an added safety feature, a gate has been added at the top of the stairs.

The beautiful gourmet kitchen features Corian countertops, mahogany cabinets, and ocean-view cooking. Included are a refrigerator, gas top range and oven, dishwasher, microwave, and additional gourmet amenities. Ideal for the gourmet chef.

The formal mahogany dining table with seating for eight and a large mahogany buffet complete this pleasurable dining experience.

The Great Room features a comfortable Seagrass loveseat with two large chairs and glass top coffee table. Two plantation style sitting chairs with mahogany accents table to give you plenty of seating for watching tv or the fabulous ocean views of the south to St. Croix and east to Ram’s head and the vast Caribbean Sea.

The large mahogany armoire contains all the electronics for your viewing and listening pleasure: A 27″ Sony, flat panel TV with expanded digital cable, VCR, stereo, CD player and Bose Sound Dock. The upper and lower outside decks feature glass top dining tables with seating for six. As an added safety feature, a gate has been added at the top of the stairs.

The Sunrise Suite

This lovely suite is named for the spectacular sunrises you see each morning from the mahogany, king size, four poster canopy bed. His and hers mahogany nightstands with matching lamps are included, along with a telephone, ceiling fan and air-conditioning. A mahogany & rattan four drawer dresser with a large closet to house all your Caribbean attire. A sitting chair is available for watching TV on the 19″ Sylvania, flat screen TV with expanded digital cable service.

Sliding glass doors open to the outside deck where two relaxing chaise lounges await you. For soaking up the sun, watching the stars or enjoying the fabulous down island views. A private bath with spacious shower including a coral stone accent wall and view to the sea completes this fabulous suite.

The Hibiscus Suite
The Hibiscus Suite contains a stately mahogany king bed with matching nightstands. Each nightstand has a lamp for reading, telephone, and ceiling fan. This suite is air-conditioned with a full bath just outside containing a large shower and full-size sink/vanity. A large 4 drawer rattan dresser is included for all your island attire along with a large closet. Sliding glass door takes you out to the large deck with chairs or chaise lounges for relaxing by day or night.

The expansive lower level includes table seating for eight, a gas grill, as well as eight reclining lounge chairs all with comfortable cushions. The expansive deck gives you plenty of room to spread out. Whether you prefer the sun or shade let the sounds of the surf lull you to sleep.

The Coconut Cabana
The Coconut Cabana has two twin beds that can easily be converted to a king. Cottage Style white wicker headboards with matching nightstands and lighting. A circular mirror adorns the 5 drawer wicker/rattan dresser along with a large walk-in closet. Three sliding windows allow for cooling tradewinds, or air-conditioning is also available. Two bedroom doors give easy access to the sitting room area just outside. Directly across is the private half bath and shared shower.

The Seaside Suite
The Seaside Suite, located on the lower level is appointed with cottage style white wicker king sized bed including matching nightstands and table lamps. A large 6 drawer wicker dresser and closet are included for all of your vacation wardrobe. A sliding glass door opens to the expansive pool deck where a large rope style hammock and pillow are ready to relax in.

A private half bath with adjacent shared shower are included along with air-conditioning, and large Adirondack chair for reading, listen to the sounds of the sea or gazing out at to the spectacular ocean view.

You’ll enjoy the villa’s convenient location, 10 minutes from the town of Cruz Bay and 15 minutes from National Park beaches. Just a short walk below lies Hart Bay Beach where you can swim, snorkel or beach comb to your Heart’s Delight.

Oceanport is a secluded villa located just 5 minutes from Cruz Bay on St. John, U.S Virgin Islands, offering stunning 180 degree ocean views of Hart Bay and beyond. Guests enjoy uninterrupted vistas from every room and deck, with frequent sightings of marine life and breathtaking sunsets.

Oceanport features a heated 25 ft x 15 ft pool with an integrated spa, positioned to receive sunlight all day (9am to 5pm), ideal for lounging and dining on the spacious coral stone patio. Outdoor dining accommodations for 8, a gas grill, and bar enhance al fresco living.

Guests can descend the 220 private stone steps to a quiet beach for snorkeling, swimming, sunbathing, beachcombing, or exploring the shore. This is a scenic trek along a rocky shoreline.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Eco-Friendly Beachfront Villa

Our simple but comfortable Villa caters to guests who are ECO-FRIENDLY, adventurous and minimalist because we utilize sustainable energy (backed up by batteries and the grid) and monitor responsible use of energy, water, cleaning agents and recycling.

Reef Bay Holiday Villa in Reef Bay on the South Shore of St. John, is a 4 bedroom, 4 bath Villa with a pool and hot tub. Spend your vacation surrounded by the Virgin Islands National Park. A 15-minute drive along a quiet road from the ferry in Cruz Bay brings the travel-weary vacationers to an idyllic island setting. Situated barely above the treetops and a 5-minute walk to the beach, lies the vacation home you will long to revisit.

This secluded, spacious Caribbean villa features Thai decor, tropical pastels, lush vegetation, and private pool. The villa is nestled in the woods with the jacuzzi in the front. Promoting outdoor living, socializing and simply Being.

You can choose to eat outside on this beautiful deck. Evenings gather on the balcony for sunset hues from billowing clouds, sails, and sunny faces!

You will find a wooded trail guarded by deer, birds, and crabs reaching a pristine beach within a 5-minute walk. Strolling further along the beach brings one to sugar mill ruins, mountain trails to petroglyphs and several additional quiet beaches.

The Great Room is in the center with comfortable furniture, lots of space, high ceilings, and views of the Caribbean through huge windows and doors. The kitchen includes all major and minor appliances, cooking utensils and a dishwasher. There are two primary suites with identical baths. Enjoy each morning with sunrise views over the hills and sea, listening to the breaking surf. Come stay at Reef Bay Villa and enjoy the private pool, hot tub, and beautiful views.

properties.reviewsHtml:
*****Best Vacation Location on St John

We’re of a group of four adult family members who have traveled to St John’s for the last nine years. We have tried numerous management companies staying at various villas throughout the island. This is the first villa we stayed in more than once and are planning our next year’s stay at this location. We have been spoiled with the best. The villa is everything it professes to be and so much more. The listing is accurate, the pictures are accurate, the private location and ease of parking, thoroughly cleaned inside and out, amenities, the convenience of electric power when the island lost power and villa layout. Highly recommend to family and friends. We’ll be back.

*****Best Escape from Oregon Winter

Reef Bay Villa provided a terrific winter escape destination/family reunion site for myself and three siblings and our spouses. The tans are fading but the memories are not. The villa offered plenty of privacy with its three separate buildings for a large group like ours; we would gather in the central great room/kitchen in the morning, have breakfast on the patio next to the pool, decide on our beach destination of the day, and head out to explore the island. Two bedrooms with a shared bath are on the other side of a small patio from the great room building; the two master suites are on the other side of the pool — this offers great ventilation, terrific views, and privacy, so you are not all on top of each other. The breezes during our February stay were lovely and we never used A/C. Viky, the concierge, was extremely helpful with meeting us at the ferry, getting us to the car rental place and the grocery store, and orienting us to the villa. When the coffee machine went on the fritz, a new one appeared in the kitchen within a few hours of our call. We felt well taken care of. The villa is immaculate and the Balinese touches are unique and beautiful. There is plenty of seating in the great room for after dinner socializing. One of our favorite things about staying at Reef Bay Villa was the fact that you didn’t need a car to walk along the beach below the house all the way to the Petroglyphs, the Reef Bay Sugar Mill, and Lameshur Bay — and mostly without seeing another person! We mostly cooked dinners together at the villa in the very well equipped kitchen with spectacular views. We had a nice dinner all together in Cruz Bay the first night at the Banana Deck and ate at Shipwreck Landing in Coral Bay later in the week after an excellent afternoon snorkel sail with Rick and Robin on their Long Distance yacht, recommended by the guest book at the villa. We did pay the $20 fee to park at Caneel Bay but since we ate lunch at one of the restaurants at this very beautiful resort, the fee was waived. Our favorite beach was Cinnamon Bay, where we snorkeled around Cinnamon Cay offshore. The villa provides a cooler for picnic lunches, beach chairs, and snorkel gear so we never had to rent. So easy to just arrive, relax and enjoy the island. Thanks to the Ward family for creating such a lovely retreat on St. John.

*****Family Vacation, Adult Children

This was a beautiful house located close to town yet secluded, access to the beach was wonderful for us. Enjoyed lounging around the pool with outside eating facilities and hot tub. House was more than comfortable for 8 people. Comfortable sleeping with the sound of waves heard even over the air conditioning which was just needed for the evening sleep. The screened porch was great for a getaway hideout, but we didn’t even have mosquito issues this trip. Thank you for opening your home to 

us. It was comfortable and lovely. Would definitely come back and recommend this home to friends.

****Graduation Vacation Celebration

Just returned from a great vacation (5/21-5/28) staying at this villa with my husband and 2 adult children with friends. The house provided us with plenty of room to gather in the evenings or privacy when needed. The trade winds help keep us cool and bug-free. After long days of hiking trails and snorkeling, we would relax around the pool and grill fish most days. We loved the seclusion and access to the National Park. The first night was a full moon and the hot tub location was magical! My favorite spot! The family really enjoyed this piece of heaven. Thank you for opening up your house.

*****Beautiful villa rental on St. John in the National Park

We stayed here (8/8 – 8/18), my family and my brother’s, four adults and four boys ranging in age from 15 to 25. The villa is beautiful, with a lovely view as it is perched on a hillside, nice decor, and comfortably appointed. The on-island manager, Viki, is a gem. She gave us great recommendations and was immediately responsive. The gentle tradewinds made August on St. John comfortable.

The villa is set up with a middle great room (not air-conditioned) and an outside eating area near the pool, plus a screened porch. On each side are the bedrooms, the two masters on one side, and on the other, a room with two twins and one with a queen. My older son originally thought he’d sleep on a couch (not wanting to share the queen with his brother), but because of the lack of AC, we rented a cot for him from Island Babies at Viki’s recommendation. The ladies at Island Babies are delightful, and I’d suggest using them for any similar needs. Viki’s recommendations for island-hopping charters and fishing charters were also spot-on– the latter got us two nights of fresh mahi-mahi dinners!

We ate at home most of the time, and the kitchen is provided with most things a cook would need to turn out a good meal for eight hungry people.

The owner, like most on St. John, is very environmentally conscious. We were told by a repairman who came by that kilowatt-hours on St. John is the third most expensive in the world! We tried to do our part by turning off the AC when not in the bedrooms. This is no problem, as the construction of the house keeps the rooms cool for hours. The island was also in the middle of a drought, so we were careful about water. Even the boys cheered when we had two days of rain!

The beach is accessible by a path. I was not able to make it there due to some mobility issues, but everyone else did. The path leads to a beach that you can’t access due to sea urchins and coral, but if you go to the right, there is a clear path into the water. Everyone told me that the beach is truly beautiful. The pool is a delight. When we got overheated, we would just jump in and be cooled off by the tradewinds.

For ten years, we have rented a house on the Outer Banks in August. The kids wanted to do something different. Absolutely everyone was delighted with Reef Bay Villa and we would come back in a heartbeat. Thank you to the owner for sharing his home with us.

properties.descriptionHtml:
SAPPHIRE SUNRISE private mid island location, high atop Bordeaux Mountain. Tesla power cells for back up power. Close to National Park Beaches. Cruz Bay 20 min. Coral Bay 10 mi.

First you will be taken in by the commanding 50-mile view of the BVI, Drakes Channel, and beyond…. Caribbean Travel Magazine has called the view from Bordeaux overlook one of the best in the Caribbean. SAPPHIRE SUNRISE is on the same mountain ridge. With fully retractable sliding doors, the living room takes advantage of the view and breezes and allows for easy conversation with guest on the veranda. A vaulted ceiling towers over the common room, that includes the living, dining, and kitchen.  The fully equipped kitchen has an island with seating for four.  A round formal dining table for six is perfect for conversations about your daily adventures and enjoying a home cooked or catered meal. With the addition of a triple water filtration system, water is clean and clear for consumption. Three bedroom suites open off the living room making this an ideal layout for families with children. Each of these suites offer a king bed, plenty of storage, ceiling fans and identical bathrooms for a fuss free vacation for three couples. A fourth bedroom is located on the lower level offering a queen bed and extra privacy. Air conditioners, though hardly ever needed on Bordeaux Mountain, are installed in every bedroom. After a day of fun and sun a refreshing dip in the pool will leave you feeling reenergized for a delicious dining experience at one of St. John’s wonderful restaurants. The breezes atop Bordeaux Mountain will keep you cool even on the hottest of nights. The sounds, scents, and sights of nature abound at Sapphire Sunrise. Tropical flowers, birds, tree-frogs, gentle trade winds, and a million stars in the night sky. Inspiring vistas of blue sea, sky, and green mountains. No Cable TV yet as a result of hurricanes but smart tv with internet connection available in great room.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Located in Great Cruz Bay, this Cliffside waterfront villa has a lovely pool, views without end, large fully air-conditioned great room, multiple dining options, abundant decks, 4 primary suites with A/C. Two King bedrooms upstairs on main level, one King bedroom and King, or Twin, bedroom downstairs, all surrounded by lovely native gardens. The house is extremely private. The whole house has WIFI high-speed internet available.

The Pool deck has plenty of lounging space and expansive views. The pool is 15′ X 6′ with a convenient sitting shelf for lounging with coffee or cocktails. The open-air great room of Serenity spills onto the multi-level deck area. The Living area sports comfortable furnishings. The outdoor, covered, upper dining area has Weber BBQ and sun shades, with easy access just off the kitchen.

The great room offers a full entertainment area with DVD/Cable TV and stereo as well as an indoor dining area that seats 6. You have the option of enjoying the natural trade winds or A/C. The kitchen is spacious and incredibly well equipped with an island between it and the great room encouraging relaxation and conversation. The two upper primary king suites of this three bedroom villa open out onto the deck and enjoy views of both the sea and gardens. Each suite has its own bath and air conditioning. There is also a private, outdoor shower.

Two bedrooms upstairs and one bedroom downstairs, all surrounded by lovely native gardens, makes this home a secluded retreat. Serenity Vista Villa sits high on the cliffside of Maria Bluff (the peninsula between Great Cruz Bay and Chocolate Hole). Convenient to Cruz Bay, yet located in one of St. John’s loveliest residential neighborhoods. Serenity is island living at its best.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Experience the essence of “Kia Orana” – a wish for a long and fulfilling life – at Villa Kia Orana in Cruz Bay, St. John, USVI. This newly renovated luxury 4-bedroom, 6-bathroom villa offers an unparalleled escape with breathtaking views of the crystal-clear Caribbean waters. Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac just minutes from restaurants, shopping, and the pristine North Shore beaches, Villa Kia Orana provides the perfect balance of seclusion and convenience.

This villa features four primary suites, each with en-suite bathrooms, indoor and outdoor showers, and a hand-carved limestone bathtub. Enjoy the island breeze from over 120 feet of covered veranda that spans the entire length of the villa, offering panoramic views of the South Shore and Caribbean Sea from sunrise to sunset.

Ideal for multiple couples, families, intimate weddings, and corporate events, Villa Kia Orana is designed with luxury and comfort in mind. The expansive great room boasts a chef’s kitchen, dining area, and living space with surround sound, perfect for entertaining. Each bedroom is equipped with air conditioning to ensure comfort throughout your stay.

Whether you’re seeking relaxation, adventure, or an unforgettable event, Villa Kia Orana is the perfect retreat for your next island escape.

Features - 

Villa Kia Orana, Cruz Bay, St. John, US Virgin Islands

Spacious Indoor/Outdoor Living: With over 8,000 square feet of luxurious living space, Villa Kia Orana offers breathtaking views of Chocolate Hole, Heart Bay, and the Caribbean Sea from every window. Experience the perfect blend of comfort and stunning scenery.

4 Primary Suites & 6 Bathrooms: Enjoy the comfort and privacy of four equally appointed Primary Suites, each with its own en-suite bathroom. With a total of 6 bathrooms, every guest will experience ultimate luxury.

Game Room: Entertainment for the whole family is at your fingertips in this well-appointed space. Well supplied for playing at any age, this space is furnished with a pool table, video games, board games, and another lounging area with a TV.

The Largest Outdoor Kitchen in St. John: Villa Kia Orana features the largest fully-equipped outdoor kitchen in St. John. Designed for both home cooks and professional chefs, it’s perfect for preparing memorable meals while soaking in panoramic views.

Prime Location in Cruz Bay: Nestled on a quiet circular street, yet just 1 minute from the Westin Resort or the local market and less than 5 minutes to downtown Cruz Bay. Villa Kia Orana combines serenity with convenient access to dining, shopping, and St. John’s world-renowned beaches.

properties.reviewsHtml:
VKO St John Rocks!

My family of four visited VKO in May 2025. This was the first home we have rented versus the usual resort and believe me when I tell you, it is well worth it. Owners Jill and Gabriel have recently remodeled this estate with every upgrade & detail including an outdoor chef’s kitchen and an outdoor shower space/massage area for the master suite! The views over Chocolate Hole is to die and by far was our favorite part of the trip having our morning coffee’s under the outdoor patio was simply stunning! They even have an outdoor propane fire pit for the evening time, but we did not use it. My kids were in heaven with their own deluxe bedroom suites and thought they were royalty! We visited the popular Windmill bar, which is not even 10 minutes away and has probably the best sunset I’ve ever seen in my life! Trunk Bay and the entrance to the Virgin Islands National Park is right there! Perfect location if you’d like to go to the different private beaches St. John has to offer! There is a convenient local supermarket three minutes away that was perfect for grabbing food for our dinners or snacks, etc. I highly recommend VKO for your family retreat or corporate function. You will not be disappointed. - Tony M., May 2025

Stunning Oasis!

We are a blended family of 10 and booked Villa Kia Orana for a birthday celebration for my wife. Per the host's suggestion, I scheduled Megan for a massage in the AMAZING outdoor bathroom that has a stone tub and windows that open to the cool breeze. It set the perfect tone to our week.  The bedrooms are spacious and were very clean. Nice bedding too. The greatroom/kitchen was perfect for hanging out. The kids eat almost every meal sitting at the bar. I really enjoyed the outdoor kitchen. I BBQ'd a few times.  The house is minutes from the best beaches and very close to town and the market.  We already booked another week at Villa Kia Orana next year! Can't wait to go back! - Paul V. April 2025

properties.descriptionHtml:
Villa South Palm is a luxury villa in the exclusive gated community of Virgin Grand Estates, an upscale neighborhood of multi-million dollar vacation homes on St. John’s spectacular Southwest Shore. Breathtaking natural beauty surrounds this four bedroom, four and a half bath home. The Villa rests on a hillside, so panoramic views and magnificent sunsets are plentiful.

The Villa is a model of classic Mediterranean style with beamed cathedral ceilings, coral stone floors, Doric columns, and French doors. Rich, warm colors and tastefully selected decor complement the grand views of Great Cruz Bay, the Caribbean Sea, St. Thomas, and smaller Caribbean islands. Rest easy knowing this house has Tesla Batteries with full power back up. The spacious veranda and sun terrace make the perfect spot to curl up with a good book in the sunshine or share cocktails while watching the sunset.

Villa South Palm is ideal for:

• Families, including multiple generations; all rooms are accessed by an interior staircase, much safer with small children; cribs available for rent on the island; first-floor laundry; satellite TV, fully-integrated audio system with indoor & outdoor speakers, board games, beach chairs, pool floats, and more to keep the young & young-at-heart entertained.

• Couples; four equal-sized primary bedrooms with king beds guarantee that each couple has a terrific room – all with sea views. Two have private balconies, and two share a private patio. Satellite televisions, ceiling fans & A/C, bedside reading lamps and built-in storage complete the picture. Our guests rave about the open air showers!

Villa South Palm is tranquil - set in a lush tropical oasis, yet central - easily travel on paved roads to the many restaurants and shops 10 minutes away in Cruz Bay or to one of St. John’s world-famous beaches.

Indoors, take advantage of the fully-equipped chef’s kitchen with cherry cabinets, granite counter tops and stainless-steel appliances, lounge in the great room, with its vaulted ceiling, 46” television, Wifi, or enjoy the views over Great Cruz Bay and St. Thomas from the many French doors. All bedrooms and common areas are individually air-conditioned. In addition, ceiling fans are located throughout Villa South Palm. Outdoors, the property is professionally landscaped with native stone walls.

Enjoy breathtaking views of the crystal blue water of Great Cruz Bay and the Caribbean Sea from poolside, or make the short drive into the town of Cruz Bay for dining, shopping, and vibrant nightlife. Whether you’re planning a romantic getaway or a memorable family adventure, Villa South Palm is a perfect choice.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Five minutes from the bustling center of Cruz Bay, you will find a secluded, landscaped retreat in Contant Farm called Argonauta. With 5 spacious bedrooms, each with its own en-suite bathroom, you will wake up each morning to spectacular ocean views. Have your coffee on the wrap around deck, sporting a 270-degree panorama of the Caribbean Sea. Then head to St John’s famous North Shore beaches, just 15 minutes away. Finish the day playing in Argonauta’s plunge pool or having a fun cocktail at the fully equipped pool bar. As the day ends, head to the hot tub to soak and watch the glorious Argonauta sunsets. When you are ready for dinner, make use of a well-equipped full chef’s kitchen or head down to Cruz Bay. Despite Argonauta’s privacy, you are just a short drive from the town center. Argonauta has two king bedroom suites in the main house. The lower main house bedroom is large enough to accommodate an additional crib or air mattress for littler guests. Its bathroom has a full outdoor shower enclosed in a screened stone grotto. The upper main house bedroom is accessed via a spiral staircase and has its own bathroom with shower. In addition to the bedroom, it has an office nook with a mahogany desk facing the sea. Two more king bedrooms are found in the adjacent guest house, each with magnificent views, stone showers, and hammocks to soothe your soul. The fifth king bedroom with en-suite bathroom is tucked away off the pool deck and contains a LifeFitness Elliptical trainer and desk. As for dining al fresco, there is a wraparound deck on the west side of the main house. It’s a great spot for dining and viewing sunsets, or watching ships large and small glide towards St. Thomas and its glittering lights in the distance.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Overlooking sublime views of Peter Bay and beyond, Villa Seacove is set within lush landscaping replete with bananas, lime, papayas, citrus, coconut palms, and a soothing garden waterfall. A grand courtyard entrance welcomes you and hints at the magnificence within.

The main villa is an architectural masterpiece of polished coral stone floors, carved coral pillars, and dramatic archways set against an artistic counterpoint of native blue bit stone walls inlaid with seashells from around the world.

On the main level, the spacious great room’s high ceilings, custom hand-carved cypress furniture, and sectional sofas share space with dining areas and a wonderful gourmet kitchen outfitted with stainless-steel appliances including 2 refrigerators with icemakers, a gas cooktop, double ovens and a generous collection of tableware. French doors open out to additional outdoor dining and Seacove’s upper sun terrace which overlooks views of Peter Bay, the green National Park lands, the British Virgin Islands, and enchanting blue ocean views.

Adjoining the great room is the air-conditioned media room/library furnished with down-filled sofas and featuring beautifully handcrafted woodwork, a large-screen HD Satellite TV, music, movies, books, and a wet bar.

The air-conditioned king primary suite adjoins, with French doors that open to the upper sun deck. And a separate office with an internet-ready Laptop computer and a fax/copier/printer. A fabulous his-and-hers bathroom/dressing room completes this lavish suite.

Interior stairs lead to Seacove’s lower level and to its second living area equipped with a large-screen HDTV with satellite, a BluRay DVD system, iPod dock, wet bar, and mini-fridge; this area opens directly out to a covered terrace bordered by the heated pool, whimsically inlaid with tile turtles.

The second and third air-conditioned bedrooms, 1-king & 1-queen, and baths are situated on opposite sides of the pool terrace. Across the courtyard is the two-story Gatehouse, each level offering an air-conditioned queen bedroom/bath suite (the lower suite has a complete small kitchen, and the upper suite two scenic balconies). All bedrooms are air-conditioned and fully screened.

properties.descriptionHtml:
As you leave the powder white sands and calm turquoise waters of Maho Bay, you travel a national park mountain road bordered by towering palm trees and other lush vegetation. At 1000 feet you ascend a steep private drive and behold a gorgeous Caribbean villa opening to spectacular views; you have arrived at Ixora. Ixora is the former home of the late Stephen Ambrose bestselling author and historian. The HBO series Band of Brothers was based on his book. Your sense of awe will be further enhanced as you step inside Ixora and survey this very beautiful and private, 5 bedroom, 4 bath, luxury home. Ixora consists of 3 traditionally styled buildings connected by decks, tiled walkways, and a garden patio. A 60-foot pool, surrounded by a 75 foot deck, a dining gazebo, abundant deck furniture, and stunning views provide a delightful daytime playground. At night the low voltage site lights, the breathtaking view, tranquil privacy, and the fabled Caribbean moonlight all combine to produce an irresistibly romantic, peaceful, and relaxing evening setting.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Now with SOLAR BACKUP! Elegant Caribbean comfort describes this beautifully appointed Villa on St. John, US Virgin Islands, overlooking the calming waters of Fish Bay. With 6 bedrooms and 5 bathrooms, Casa Del Palmas is designed to comfortably accommodate large families, groups of friends, and small retreat groups, up to 12 guests.

You will find privacy with individual suite style bedrooms as well as a variety of open indoor and outdoor spaces to play games, gather for conversation, dine, lounge poolside, practice yoga, or tuck in alone to read a book. Casa Del Palmas is nestled hillside in a lush and quiet neighborhood only ten minutes from Cruz Bay, providing convenient access to Cruz Bay’s shopping, water sports, groceries and restaurants. Beach towels, beach chairs, coolers, and pool toys are also available to use during your stay.

Enjoy days of hiking and snorkeling the many Virgin Islands National Park trails and reefs. Go boating or go explore some of the many plantation era ruins, or simply lie by the pool with a book and glass of wine. No matter what your choice, Casa Del Palmas is designed to relax and rejuvenate the most road weary guest.

properties.reviewsHtml:
Stayed with Kids

Our three-generation family of ten had a fantastic stay at Casa del Palmas. This was our third villa rental on St. John and though all have been nice (it says something that we keep coming back!), this one is my new favorite. The house is lovely and was perfect for a multi-family vacation. Each couple and set of kids had their own comfortable, private space and the shared spaces facilitated lots of fun family time together. We cooked dinner in the spacious and well-appointed kitchen almost every night and enjoyed eating all together around the big table where there was room for all of us. The kitchen had everything we needed. We also enjoyed afternoons with the kids in the pool and the adults around the outdoor bar. We loved the relative quiet of the Fish Bay neighborhood. It's a 15-ish minute trip into Cruz Bay and a great home base for exploring all St. John has to offer. We also appreciated the beach chairs, coolers, and other gear available to guests. Would definitely come again! - Emily

Most Beautiful Place on Earth!

My girlfriend and I recently visited St. John and stayed at Casa Del Palmas for a week, it was the best vacation we have ever been on. The house is situated in a cozy bay right on the edge of the national park, the views from the top and bottom deck are gorgeous. The neighborhood is quiet and very friendly, oftentimes we would take a walk during the mornings and were greeted by neighbors walking their dog or taking a stroll. The location of the house makes getting to the rest of the island very convenient, we were able to visit 5-6 different beaches while we were there with no problems! They had towels, coolers, beach bags, rafts etc. readily available for use so we didn't have to bring our own. The house itself was newly renovated, the appliances were all stainless steel, granite countertops (my girlfriend's favorite was their coffee maker), all that you would expect of a top notch island property. We were more than satisfied with our stay at Casa Del Palmas and will be back sooner than later. Don't forget to take some time and add to their house coloring book and sign your name! - Brett M.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Overlooking the quiet community of Coral Bay, the impressive 4 1/2 acre estate affords majestic views of St. John’s East End as well as the British Virgin Islands of Tortola, Virgin Gorda, Norman Island and several smaller cays along the Sir Francis Drake Channel.

Chateau Margot is only 1½ miles from the turnoff Centerline Road that leads straight down to the amazing Maho Bay and Francis Bay Beaches and is only three miles from the center of Coral Bay. To reach the estate, travel five miles from downtown Cruz Bay, halfway through the Virgin Islands National Park, on cool tree-canopied Centerline Road. Only a short drive after passing the Reef Bay Trail entrance, the road to the estate forks off just to the right of the Bordeaux complex. From there, a half a mile of paved curves around and down to the grand white gates of Chateau Margot.

Chateau Margot shares a name with one of the world’s best wines. Margot, a red claret wine of “truly incomparable distinction and class”,  always “well-balanced and unsurpassed by any other wine on earth” makes an appropriate namesake for this estate. Being distinctive and classy, Chateau Margot stands out and above most other St. John Properties. This villa’s classic quality and exceptional superiority are impossible to deny when noticing the warmth of carved teak and mahogany woods; the lasting beauty and strength of polished granite, coral and marble tiles; and the innovative appliances, fixtures, and electronics found all throughout its structure. The artistic blending of a rich regal decor, set within coolly casual curves and angles, adapted to the middle of a secluded tropical forest, gives this estate the well-balanced “premier grand cru” classification that it truly deserves.

Winding terraces, railed wooden decks, native stone paths, gardens and koi ponds connect Chateau Margot’s three large masonry buildings.

Completely renovated under the conception and direction of talented interior designer Adette Irish, this villa showcases original art from local artists such as Amy Tracer, Les Anderson, Elaine Estern and Janet Cook-Rutnik among others. Well known names for linens, rugs, and furnishings are artfully arranged against St. John handcrafted doors, cabinetry, and native stone walls.

The interior living space is 6,165 square ft. and the exterior decking is 2,300 square ft. for a total of 8,465 square ft. of pure Caribbean paradise.  The main level of the three-story Great House holds the living, dining and kitchen areas, as well as the infinity-edged pool and sundeck.

A center planter of Philodendron Selloum separates the living room doors on the right from the individual doors for office, laundry and powder room on the left. The office has abundant built-in desk space with two chairs, a computer with wireless satellite hookup, phone, fax, copier, scanner and set of encyclopedias for those guests who just can’t leave their work behind. The laundry room contains a washer and two dryers, iron, built-in ironing board and a working table. A small powder room is located between the other two rooms for quick and convenient access from the most used living areas of the house.

The Margot Primary Suite and the Pineapple and Parrot bedrooms are on the upper level of the Great House.

Situated beside the Great House, is the 2 level Guest House, containing both the Orchid and Bamboo Suites.

Overlooking the Great House, is the freestanding Coral Cottage, a very private bedroom/bath that also has a kitchenette.

All bedrooms contain ceiling fans, and each has its own A/C. This countryside villa is ideal for one, two or three families.  The arrangement of the three upper bedrooms in the Great House is perfect for parents with younger children.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Oceana Villa, located in Chocolate Hole, is a classic Caribbean style 6 Bedroom, 6 1/2 bath home featuring pool, split system A/C in every room, including the great room up and media room down.

This easy access home has great views overlooking Great Cruz Bay. Luxuriating in the infinity edge pool you'll enjoy seeing St. Thomas, framed by the outer cays on the horizon. Oceana’s pool is a healthy 10’ x 18’, with a maximum depth of 5 feet.

The great room has cable TV, DVD, and stereo. Sound feeds into the spa area, kitchen and decks off the great room and pool, each with individual volume controls. While Oceana is surrounded with all the Caribbean delights St. John has to offer, it was purposely designed as a villa to be stayed in.

The great room and kitchen are fully screened and has spilt A/C option, in case our normally generous trade winds are light, and will make for some truly memorable gatherings. With gourmet level appliances, meals can be prepared or catered to any level of sophistication. A four-stage filter provides crystal clear drinking water from every faucet.

With 6 air-conditioned bedrooms on two levels, Oceana accommodates nearly any size group. The villa is child-friendly and ideal for multiple generation families, with a handicap accessible bath. The upper level has three rooms with king beds, each with separate access. All bedrooms have ocean views.

properties.reviewsHtml:
Have been traveling to St John for more than 28 years and Oceana is by far the nicest villa we have ever stayed in. Spacious, private, close to town, easy access, and very comfortable. All the bedrooms are separated in a way to offer privacy to each guest, very well furnished with plush bedding and a/c in every room. Fantastic views and sunsets. Nice dipping pool to cool off in after a day in the sun. I would absolutely rent from Vacation Vistas again, and would not hesitate to request Oceana as my first choice.  Five stars! - Arthur

We enjoyed a wonderful week with friends at Oceana in January. The house perfectly designed and thoughtfully and thoroughly furnished, sited overlooking Great Cruz Bay and St Thomas beyond. Every detail was considered to provide the perfect island vacation. The house accommodated 9 of us providing both privacy with individual decks and a shared terrace for gathering and dining. And St Johns perfect beaches are moments away, though many of us were perfectly happy on the terrace. We hope to return often and when we do, we will look forward to returning to the Oceana. Thanks to our hosts for creating this retreat. The pictures don’t do it justice. - Sue
